116+ trigger OnValidate()
117+ var
118+ CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
119+ SalesItemChargeErr: Label 'Charging Method can only be set to Calc. Separatly if the Cost Type has a Sales Item Charge defined.';
120+ begin

122+ CalcCostType.Get("Cost Type");
123+ if CalcCostType."Sales Item Charge" = '' then
124+ Error(SalesItemChargeErr);

126+ Validate("Margin %", 0);
127+ end;
128+ end;

158  trigger OnInsert()

160  TestForecastStatusOpen();
161  end;
162 
163  trigger OnModify()
164  begin
165  TestForecastStatusOpen();
166  end;
167 
168  internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
169  begin
170  GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
171  CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
172  end;
173 
174  local procedure GetCalcForecast(ForecastNo: Code[20])
175  begin
176  if not HasCalcForecast then
177  HasCalcForecast := CalcForecast.Get(ForecastNo);
178  end;
179 
180  local procedure UpdateCostAmount()
181  var
182  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
183  begin
184  Amount := CalcForecastMgt.GetCostAmount(Rec);
185  end;
186 
187  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
188  var
189  CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
190  begin
191  CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
192  if CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
193  exit(10000);
194  CalcCost.FindLast();
195  exit(CalcCost."Line No." + 10000);
196  end;
197 
198  var
199  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
200  HasCalcForecast: Boolean;
201 }

1 table 5446001 "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"
2 {
3  Caption = 'Additional Configuration';
4  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
5  DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
6  LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
7 
8  //Always update archive table as well!
9 
10  fields
11  {
12  field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
13  {
14  Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
15  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
16  TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast"."No.";
17  }
18  field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
19  {
20  Caption = 'Line No.';
21  }
22  field(6; "No."; Code[20])
23  {
24  Caption = 'No.';
25  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
26  TableRelation = if (Type = const(Item)) Item."No."
27  else
28  if (Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."No." where("TSRM In Stock As" = filter("Current Asset" | "Fixed Asset"))
29  else
30  if (Type = const(Comment)) "Standard Text";
31 
32  trigger OnValidate()
33  var
34  Item: Record Item;
35  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
36  StandardText: Record "Standard Text";
37  TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
38  Vendor: Record Vendor;
39  ItemTemplMgt: Codeunit "Item Templ. Mgt.";
40  DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
41  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
42  EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
43  ServiceItemDataMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
44  UsedPartsTaxMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Used Parts Tax Mgt.";
45  VendorItemNoMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Vendor Item No. Mgt.";
46  begin
47  CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
48  TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
49  Init();
50  Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
51  "No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."No.";
52  "Vendor No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor No.";
53  "Vendor Name" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor Name";
54  "Purchase Order Type" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Order Type";
55  "Responsibility Center" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Responsibility Center";
56  "Location Code" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Location Code";
57  if "Line No." = 0 then
58  "Line No." := Rec.GetNextLineNo();
59  case Type of
60  Type::Item:
61  begin
62  if not Item.Get("No.") then
63  exit;
64  Description := Item.Description;
65  if Vendor.Get(Item."Vendor No.") then
66  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
67  Quantity := 1;
68  Validate("Unit of Measure", Item."Base Unit of Measure");
69  UsedPartsTaxMgt.UpdateLineOnAfterValidateNo(Rec);
70  CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
71  if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
72  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
73  end;
74  Type::"Service Item":
75  begin
76  if not ServiceItem.Get("No.") then
77  exit;
78  case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
79  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
80  if ServiceItem."Item No." = '' then begin
81  Commit();
82  ItemTemplMgt.InsertItemFromTemplate(Item);
83  ServiceItem.Validate("Item No.", Item."No.");
84  ServiceItem.Modify();
85  end;
86  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
87  ServiceItem.TestField("TSRM Fixed Asset No.");
88  end;
89  Description := ServiceItem.Description;
90  "List Price" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Price";
91  "Direct Unit Cost" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Cost";
92  Validate(Quantity, 1);
93  "Unit of Measure" := ServiceItem."Unit of Measure Code";
94  if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
95  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
96  EquipmentMgt.FillAttachedEquipmentLines(Rec);
97  ServiceItemDataMgt.FillServiceItemData(Rec);
98  end;
99  Type::Comment:
100  begin
101  StandardText.Get("No.");
102  Description := StandardText.Description;
103  CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
104  end;
105  end;
106  VendorItemNoMgt.TransferVendorItemNo(Rec);
107  end;
108  }
109  field(7; "Unit of Measure"; Code[10])
110  {
111  Caption = 'Unit of Measure';
112  TableRelation = if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const(Item)) "Item Unit of Measure".Code where("Item No." = field("No."))
113  else
114  if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."Unit of Measure Code" where("No." = field("No."))
115  else
116  "Unit of Measure".Code;
117 
118  trigger OnValidate()
119  var
120  Item: Record Item;
121  ItemUnitofMeasure: Record "Item Unit of Measure";
122  begin
123  if "Unit of Measure" = xRec."Unit of Measure" then
124  exit;
125 
126  if "Unit of Measure" = '' then
127  exit;
128 
129  if Type = Type::Item then begin
130  Item.Get("No.");
131 
132  ItemUnitofMeasure.Get(Item."No.", "Unit of Measure");
133 
134  if Item."Unit Price" <> 0 then
135  Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Price" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity)
136  else
137  if "List Price" = 0 then
138  Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
139  Validate("Direct Unit Cost", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
140  end;
141  end;
142  }
143  field(9; Type; Enum "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type")
144  {
145  Caption = 'Type';
146  trigger OnValidate()
147  var
148  TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
149  begin
150  TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
151  Init();
152  if TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type <> TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type::Comment then begin
153  Rec.InitOrderType();
154  Rec.InitResponsibilityCenter();
155  end;
156  Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
157  end;
158  }

172  WrongQuantityErr: Label 'Quantity cannot be more than 1 when Type is Service Item.';

270  trigger OnValidate()

306  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
307  TableRelation = Vendor."No.";
308 
309  trigger OnValidate()
310  var
311  Vendor: Record Vendor;
312  begin
313  if "Vendor No." = xRec."Vendor No." then
314  exit;
315  if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
316  Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
317  "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
318  end else
319  "Vendor Name" := '';
320  InitResponsibilityCenter();
321  end;
322  }
323  field(41; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
324  {
325  Caption = 'Vendor Name';
326  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
327  trigger OnLookup()
328  var
329  Vendor: Record Vendor;
330  begin
331  CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
332  if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
333  if Vendor.Name = '' then
334  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
335  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
336  end;
337  end;
338 
339  trigger OnValidate()
340  var
341  Vendor: Record Vendor;
342  HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
343  LookupVar: Variant;
344  begin
345  CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
346  if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
347  LookupVar := Vendor;
348  if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
349  Error('');
350  Vendor := LookupVar;
351  if Vendor.Name = '' then
352  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
353  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
354  end else
355  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
356  end;
357  }

458  {
459  Caption = 'Attached Equipmen';
460  Editable = false;
461  }
462  field(110; "Linked to Service Item"; Boolean)
463  {
464  Caption = 'Linked to Service Item';
465  }
466  field(120; "Line Action"; Enum "TSRD Service Line Action")
467  {
468  Caption = 'Line Action';
469  ValuesAllowed = " ", "Attach", "Cap. Service";
470+ ObsoleteState = Pending;
471+ ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by Charging Method.';
472+ ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
473+ }
474+ field(121; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Charging Method Ext.")
475+ {
476+ Caption = 'Charging Method';
477+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
478+
479+ trigger OnValidate()
480+ begin
481+ if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::Attach then
482+ "Margin %" := 0;
483+
484+ if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separatly" then begin
485+ Validate("Show in Sales Document", true);
486+ CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
487+ CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
488+ end else if ("Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::Included) or ("Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::" ") then
489+ Validate("Margin %", 0);
490+ end;
491  }
492  }

512  fieldgroups

516  }
517 
518  trigger OnInsert()
519  begin
520  TestForecastStatusOpen();
521  InitOrderType();
522  InitResponsibilityCenter();
523  Rec."Calculate Separately" := not CalcForecast."Fix Price allowed";
524  end;
525 
526  trigger OnModify()
527  begin
528  TestForecastStatusOpen();
529  end;
530 
531  internal procedure InitType()
532  begin
533  Type := xRec.Type;
534  end;
535 
536  trigger OnDelete()
537  var
538  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
539  begin
540  CalcForecastMgt.DeleteNonStockExtEquipment(Rec);
541  CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
542  end;
543 
544  internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
545  begin
546  GetCalcForecast();
547  CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
548  CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
549  end;
550 
551  local procedure UpdateDiscount()
552  begin
553  if "List Price" <> 0 then
554  "Discount %" := (1 - ("Direct Unit Cost" / "List Price")) * 100
555  else
556  "Discount %" := 0;
557  end;
558 
559  local procedure UpdateDirectUnitCost()
560  begin
561  "Direct Unit Cost" := Round("List Price" - ("List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100)), 0.01);
562  end;
563 
564  local procedure UpdateLineAmounts()
565  var
566  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
567  LineDiscAmt: Decimal;
568  begin
569  "Line Amount (List Price)" := "List Price" * Quantity;
570  "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" := "Direct Unit Cost" * Quantity;
571 
572  LineDiscAmt := Round(Quantity * "List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100), 0.01);
573  "Line Amount" := (Quantity * "List Price") - LineDiscAmt;
574  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
575  "Line Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin("Line Amount", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
576  end;
577 
578  local procedure UpdateMargin()
579  var
580  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
581  begin
582  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
583  UpdateMarginAmount();
584  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
585  end;
586 
587  local procedure UpdateMarginAmount()
588  begin
589  "Margin Amount" := "Line Amount" - "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
590  end;
591 
592  local procedure GetCalcForecast()
593  begin
594  CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
595  end;
596 
597  local procedure CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed()
598  var
599  AlreadyExistErr: Label 'Purchase document already exist for this line, Vendor cannot be changed.';
600  begin
601  if "Purchase Document No." <> '' then
602  Error(AlreadyExistErr);
603  end;
604 
605  internal procedure IsMarginPercentageViable(MarginCalculator: Interface "TSRD MarginCalculator")
606  begin
607  MarginCalculator.IsMarginPercentageViable("Margin %");
608  end;
609 
610  procedure GetCommentLineForm() CommentForm: Text[100]
611  var
612  DescriptionExtension: Text;
613  begin
614  if Quantity <> 0 then begin
615  DescriptionExtension := ' (' + Format(Quantity);
616  if "Unit of Measure" <> '' then
617  DescriptionExtension += ' ' + "Unit of Measure" + ')'
618  else
619  DescriptionExtension += ')';
620  end;
621  CommentForm := CopyStr(Description, 1, MaxStrLen(CommentForm) - StrLen(DescriptionExtension)) + DescriptionExtension;
622  end;
623 
624  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
625  var
626  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
627  begin
628  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
629  if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
630  exit(10000);
631  CalcExternalEquipment.FindLast();
632  exit(CalcExternalEquipment."Line No." + 10000);
633  end;
634 
635  internal procedure InitOrderType()
636  var
637  UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
638  begin
639  UserSetup.Get(UserId());
640  if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
641  Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
642  end;
643 
644  internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
645  var
646  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
647  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
648  begin
649  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
650  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
651  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
652  end;
653 
654  internal procedure OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument()
655  var
656  PurchaseInvoiceHeader: Record "Purch. Inv. Header";
657  PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
658  begin
659  case "Purchase Document Type" of
660  "Purchase Document Type"::Order:
661  if PurchaseHeader.Get(PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order, "Purchase Document No.") then
662  Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order", PurchaseHeader);
663  "Purchase Document Type"::"Posted Invoice":
664  if PurchaseInvoiceHeader.Get("Purchase Document No.") then
665  Page.Run(Page::"Posted Purchase Invoice", PurchaseInvoiceHeader);
666  end
667  end;
668 
669  local procedure UpdateShowInSalesOnLinkedExtEquipmentLines()
670  var
671  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
672  begin
673  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
674  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", "Line No.");
675  if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
676  CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Show in Sales Document", "Show in Sales Document");
677  end;
678 
679  var
680  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
681  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
682 }

29  trigger OnValidate()
30  var
31  Vendor: Record Vendor;
32  DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
33  begin
34  TestStatusOpen();
35  if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
36  Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
37  "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
38  end else
39  "Vendor Name" := '';
40  InitResponsibilityCenter();
41  if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor No.")) or
42  (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor Name"))
43  then
44  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
45  end;

47  field(4; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
48  {
49  Caption = 'Vendor Name';
50  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
51  trigger OnLookup()
52  var
53  Vendor: Record Vendor;
54  begin
55  TestStatusOpen();
56  if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
57  if Vendor.Name = '' then
58  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
59  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
60  end;
61  end;
62 
63  trigger OnValidate()
64  var
65  Vendor: Record Vendor;
66  HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
67  LookupVar: Variant;
68  begin
69  TestStatusOpen();
70  if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
71  LookupVar := Vendor;
72  if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
73  Error('');
74  Vendor := LookupVar;
75  if Vendor.Name = '' then
76  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
77  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
78  end else
79  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
80  end;
81  }

453  trigger OnValidate()
454  var
455  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
456  OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
457  begin

460  UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
461  CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
462  CalcForecastMgt.RecalculateSalesDiscountsOnSalesPriceChange(Rec);
463  if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
464  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
465  UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
466  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
467  if Rec."Base Machine List Price" <> xRec."Base Machine List Price" then
468  OverAllowanceMgt.RecreateOverAllowances(Rec);
469  end;
470  }
471  field(50; Template; Boolean)
472  {
473  Caption = 'Template';
474  Editable = false;
475  }
476  field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
477  {
478  Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
479  Editable = false;
480  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
481  }
482  field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
483  {
484  Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
485  Editable = false;
486  }
487  field(62; "Service Item Created"; Boolean)
488  {
489  Caption = 'Service Item Created';
490  Editable = false;
491  }
492  field(70; "Location Code"; Code[10])
493  {
494  Caption = 'Location Code';
495  TableRelation = Location;
496  }
497  field(80; "Calculated Margin %"; Decimal)
498  {
499  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
500  AutoFormatType = 10;
501  Caption = 'Calculated Margin %';
502  CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(CalculatedMarginLbl, ' %');
503  Editable = false;
504  MinValue = 0.0001;
505 
506  trigger OnValidate()
507  begin
508  TestStatusOpen();
509  UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
510  end;
511  }
512  field(81; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
513  {
514  Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
515  Editable = false;
516 
517  trigger OnValidate()
518  begin
519  if ((xRec."Calculated Sales Price" = "Sales Price") and ("Calculated Sales Price" <> "Sales Price"))
520  or ("Sales Price" < "Calculated Sales Price") and (Status <> Status::Released)
521  then begin
522  Rec.Validate("Sales Price", "Calculated Sales Price");
523  exit;
524  end;
525  UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
526  UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC();
527  end;
528  }
529  field(82; "Margin %"; Decimal)
530  {
531  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
532  AutoFormatType = 10;
533  Caption = 'Margin %';
534  CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
535  MinValue = 0;
536 
537  trigger OnValidate()
538  var
539  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
540  begin
541  CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
542  if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
543  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
544  "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
545  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
546  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
547  end;
548  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
549  end;
550  }
551  field(83; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
552  {
553  Caption = 'Sales Price';
554  MinValue = 0;
555 
556  trigger OnValidate()
557  var
558  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
559  begin
560  if CurrFieldNo <> 0 then
561  TestStatusOpen();
562  if "Sales Price" = 0 then
563  "Sales Price" := "Calculated Sales Price";
564  if "Calculated Sales Price" = 0 then
565  exit;
566  if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
567  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
568  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
569  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
570  end;
571  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
572  if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Sales Price") then
573  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
574  end;
575  }
576  field(84; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
577  {
578  Caption = 'Margin Amount';
579  CaptionClass = GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
580  trigger OnValidate()
581  var
582  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
583  begin
584  TestStatusOpen();
585  if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
586  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
587  "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitCost() + "Margin Amount";
588  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
589  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
590  end;
591  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
592  end;
593  }
594  field(90; "Workshop (Separate)"; Decimal)
595  {
·- CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Separately" = const(true)));
596+ CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separatly")));
597  Caption = 'Services (Separate)';
598  Editable = false;
599  FieldClass = FlowField;
600  }
601  field(95; "Conf Price with Calc. Discount"; Decimal)
602  {
603  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
604  Caption = 'Configuration Price with Calc. Discount';
605  Editable = false;
606  FieldClass = FlowField;
607  ObsoleteReason = 'Not needed anymore. Field Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost) is used instead.';
608  ObsoleteState = Pending;
609  ObsoleteTag = '2302.2411';
610  }
611  field(96; "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc"; Decimal)
612  {
613  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
614  Caption = 'Direct unit cost Price with Calc. Discount';
615  Editable = false;
616  FieldClass = FlowField;
617  }
618  field(100; "Return Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Forecast Ret Type")
619  {
620  Caption = 'Return Type';
621  trigger OnValidate()
622  var
623  AgencyBusinessMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Agency Business Mgt.";
624  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
625  ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Fix Price is allowed for this Calculation Worksheet. You can''t change the Return Type.';
626  begin
627  if Rec."Return Type" = xRec."Return Type" then
628  exit;
629  CheckIsReturnTypeEditable();
630  if Rec."Fix Price allowed" then
631  Error(ReturnTypeErr);
632  if "Return Type" = "Return Type"::"Agency Business" then
633  AgencyBusinessMgt.CheckUserSetupActivated();
634  CalcForecastMgt.CheckAndDeleteRelatedData(Rec);
635  end;
636  }

734  field(122; "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
735  {
736  Caption = 'Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
737  Editable = false;
738 
739  trigger OnValidate()
740  var
741  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
742  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
743  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
744  MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
745  begin
746  "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
747  "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" / ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
748  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
749  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
750 
751  if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
752  Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
753  end;
754  }
755  field(123; "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
756  {
757  Caption = 'Surcharge Amount (Fix Price)';
758  Editable = false;
759  }

761  {
762  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
763  AutoFormatType = 10;
764  Caption = 'Surcharge % (Fix Price)';
765  Editable = false;
766  }

768  {
769  Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
770  TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
771  }
772  field(126; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
773  {
774  Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
775  TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
776 
777  trigger OnLookup()
778  var
779  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
780  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
781  begin
782  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
783  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
784  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
785  end;
786 
787  trigger OnValidate()
788  var
789  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
790  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
791  begin
792  RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
793  CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
794  end;
795  }
796  field(127; "Fix Price allowed"; Boolean)
797  {
798  Caption = 'Fix Price allowed';
799 
800  trigger OnValidate()
801  var
802  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
803  FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr: Label 'Fix Price has already been calculated. Please remove the Fix Price first';
804  ReturnTypeErr: Label 'You can''t set Fix Price Allowed if Return Type is set.';
805  begin
806  if not Rec."Fix Price allowed" then begin
807  Rec."Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" := 0;
808  Rec."Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := 0;
809  Rec."Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := 0;
810  end else begin
811  if Rec."Return Type" <> Rec."Return Type"::" " then
812  Error(ReturnTypeErr);
813  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
814  if CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
815  Error(FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr);
816  TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Fix Price allowed"));
817  CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate();
818  CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate();
819  end;
820  end;
821  }
822  field(128; "Calculated Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
823  {
824  Caption = 'Calculated Machine Sales Price';
825  Editable = false;
826  }
827  field(129; "Show calculated Sales Prices"; Boolean)
828  {
829  Caption = 'Show calculated Sales Prices';
830 
831  trigger OnValidate()
832  begin
833  if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then begin
834  TestField("Show List Prices", false);
835  TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Show calculated Sales Prices"));
836  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
837  end else
838  EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields();
839  end;
840  }
841  field(130; "Includes Sales Discount"; Boolean)
842  {
843  Caption = 'Includes Sales Discount';
844  Editable = false;
845 
846  trigger OnValidate()
847  begin
848  if "Includes Sales Discount" then
849  if "Margin %" <> "Calculated Margin %" then
850  Validate("Margin %", "Calculated Margin %");
851  end;
852  }
853  field(131; "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
854  {
855  Caption = 'Fixed Asset Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
856  Editable = false;
857 
858  trigger OnValidate()
859  var
860  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
861  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
862  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
863  MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
864  begin
865  if Rec."Service Item In Stock As" <> Rec."Service Item In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset" then
866  exit;
867  "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
868  "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" / ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
869  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
870  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
871 
872  if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
873  Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
874  end;
875  }
876  field(132; "VAT Prod. Posting Group"; Code[20])
877  {
878  Caption = 'VAT Prod. Posting Group';
879  TableRelation = "VAT Product Posting Group";
880 
881  trigger OnValidate()
882  var
883  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
884  VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
885  begin
886  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
887  exit;
888  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
889  VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group");
890  UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
891  end;
892  }

894  {
895  Caption = 'Sales Price incl. VAT';
896 
897  trigger OnValidate()
898  begin
899  Validate("Sales Price", "Sales Price incl. VAT" * (100 / (100 + "VAT %")));
900  end;
901  }

939  ("Calculation Currency" <> '') and
940  ("Calculation Currency" = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
941  Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
942  PrefillCalcExchangeRate();
943  UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier();
944  end;
945  }

947  {
948  Caption = 'Calculation Currency Exchange Rate';

952  var

954  CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr: Label 'Calculation Currency is not defined';
955  begin
956  if ("Calculation Currency" = '') and (CurrFieldNo = (FieldNo("Calc Currency Exchange Rate"))) then
957  Error(CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr);
958  if "Calc Currency Exchange Rate" = 0 then
959  Error(CalcCurrExchangeRateErr);
960  end;

992  {

994  Editable = false;
995  }
996  field(200; "Over-Allowance Cost"; Decimal)
997  {
998  CalcFormula =
999  sum(
1000  "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Over-Allowance Allocation"
1001  where(
1002  "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
1003  "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
1004  )
1005  );
1006  Caption = 'Over-Allowance Cost';
1007  Editable = false;
1008  FieldClass = FlowField;
1009  }
1010  field(201; "Over-Allowance Price"; Decimal)
1011  {
1012  CalcFormula =
1013  sum(
1014  "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Return Price Allocation"
1015  where(
1016  "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
1017  "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
1018  )
1019  );
1020  Caption = 'Over-Allowance Price';
1021  Editable = false;
1022  FieldClass = FlowField;
1023  }
1024  field(202; "Over-Allowance Lines Exist"; Boolean)
1025  {
1026  CalcFormula =
1027  exist(
1028  "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch"
1029  where(
1030  "Forecast No." = field("No."),
1031  "Over-Allowance Value" = filter(<> 0),
1032  "Over-Allowance Posted" = const(false)
1033  )
1034  );
1035  Caption = 'Over-Allowance Lines Exist';
1036  Editable = false;
1037  FieldClass = FlowField;
1038  }

1040  {
1041  Caption = 'Service Activities';
1042  Editable = false;
1043  }

1045  {
1046  Caption = 'Return Status';
1047  Editable = false;
1048  }
1049 
1050  }
1051  keys
1052  {
1053  key(PK; "No.")
1054  {
1055  Clustered = true;
1056  }
1057  key(ServiceItemNoKey; "Service Item No.")
1058  {
1059  }
1060  key(SortKey; "Sort No.", "Version No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
1061  {
1062  }
1063  key(SalesPriceKey; "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
1064  {
1065  MaintainSiftIndex = true;
1066  SumIndexFields = "Sales Price";
1067  }
1068  key(TemplateKey; Template, "System-Created", "Purchase Document Type", "Purchase Document No.", "Base Code")
1069  {
1070  }
1071  key(StatusKey; Status)
1072  {
1073  }
1074  }
1075  trigger OnInsert()
1076  var
1077  begin
1078  if "No." = '' then
1079  GenerateNoSeries(true);
1080  "Creation Date" := Today();
1081  "Creation by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
1082  InitOrderType();
1083  InitResponsibilityCenter();
1084  TestMandatoryFields();
1085  UpdateDescription();
1086  CheckServItemCalculation();
1087  end;
1088 
1089  trigger OnModify()
1090  var
1091  begin
1092  TestStatusOpen();
1093  "Last Date Modified" := Today();
1094  "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
1095  TestMandatoryFields();
1096  end;
1097 
1098  trigger OnRename()
1099  begin
1100  "Last Date Modified" := Today();
1101  "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
1102  TestMandatoryFields();
1103  end;
1104 
1105  trigger OnDelete()
1106  var
1107  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1108  begin
1109  TestStatusOpen();
1110  TestSystemCreatedFalse();
1111  TestSalesCalculationStatus();
1112  if not SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader then
1113  CalcForecastMgt.ClearForecastNoInPurchaseOrder(Rec."No.");
1114  CalcForecastMgt.RenumberSortNos(Rec);
1115  end;
1116 
1117  procedure GenerateNoSeries(FromTemplate: Boolean)
1118  begin
1119  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1120  case FromTemplate of
1121  true:
1122  begin
1123  SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
1124  "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
1125  Template := true;
1126  end;
1127  false:
1128  begin
1129  SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
1130  "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
1131  end;
1132  end
1133  end;
1134 
1135  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
1136  var
1137  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1138  begin
1139  CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Line No.");
1140  CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
1141  CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
1142  if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
1143  exit(10000);
1144  CalcForecast.FindLast();
1145  exit(CalcForecast."Line No." + 10000);
1146  end;
1147 
1148  procedure GetNextSortNo(): Integer
1149  var
1150  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1151  begin
1152  CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Sort No.");
1153  CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
1154  CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
1155  if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
1156  exit(1);
1157  CalcForecast.FindLast();
1158  exit(CalcForecast."Sort No." + 1);
1159  end;
1160 
1161  procedure SetSkipCheckSystemCreated(NewSkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean)
1162  begin
1163  SkipCheckSystemCreated := NewSkipCheckSystemCreated;
1164  end;
1165 
1166  internal procedure GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal
1167  var
1168  Handled: Boolean;
1169  begin
1170  OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, BaseMachineListPriceSales);
1171  if Handled then
1172  exit;
1173  exit(Rec."Base Machine List Price");
1174  end;
1175 
1176  internal procedure GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() ListPriceSales: Decimal
1177  var
1178  Handled: Boolean;
1179  begin
1180  OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, ListPriceSales);
1181  if Handled then
1182  exit;
1183  exit(Rec."List Price");
1184  end;
1185 
1186  internal procedure UpdateDescription()
1187  var
1188  StringMgt: Codeunit "TSR String Mgt.";
1189  ReturnList: List of [Text];
1190  Descr: Text;
1191  xDescr: Text;
1192  begin
1193  CalcFields("Manufacturer Name", "Subcategory Name", "Series Name", "Model Name");
1194  Descr := "Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + "Subcategory Name" + ' ' + "Series Name" + ' ' + "Model Name";
1195  xDescr := xRec."Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + xRec."Subcategory Name" + ' ' + xRec."Series Name" + ' ' + xRec."Model Name";
1196  Descr := Descr.Trim().Replace(' ', ' ');
1197  xDescr := xDescr.Trim().Replace(' ', ' ');
1198  if Description <> '' then
1199  if Description <> xDescr then
1200  exit;
1201  if StringMgt.SplitStringSpecificLen(Descr, MaxStrLen(Description), ' ', ReturnList) then
1202  Validate(Description, ReturnList.Get(1));
1203  end;
1204 
1205  internal procedure GetDate(): Date
1206  var
1207  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1208  begin
1209  if CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") and (CalcSalesForecast.Date <> 0D) then
1210  exit(CalcSalesForecast.Date);
1211  exit(WorkDate());
1212  end;
1213 
1214  internal procedure GetStatusStyleText() StatusStyleText: Text
1215  begin
1216  case Status of
1217  Status::Open:
1218  StatusStyleText := 'Favorable';
1219  Status::Alternative:
1220  StatusStyleText := 'StrongAccent'
1221  else
1222  StatusStyleText := 'Strong';
1223  end;
1224 
1225  OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec, StatusStyleText);
1226  end;
1227 
1228  procedure SetSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader(NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean)
1229  begin
1230  SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader := NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader;
1231  end;
1232 
1233  procedure TestStatusOpen()
1234  begin
1235  if DoNotTestStatusOpen or StatusCheckSuspended then
1236  exit;
1237  if not (Rec.Status in [Status::Open, Status::Alternative]) then
1238  Rec.FieldError(Status);
1239  end;
1240 
1241  internal procedure TestSalesCalculationStatus()
1242  var
1243  StatusWonOrLostErr: Label 'Configure Price Quote status is either won or lost. You can''t change the Calculation Worksheet.';
1244  begin
1245  if Rec.GetStatusCheckSuspended() then
1246  exit;
1247  if Rec.GetSalesCalculationStatus() in ["TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won, "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Lost] then
1248  Error(StatusWonOrLostErr);
1249  end;
1250 
1251  procedure GetCalculatedUnitCost() CalculatedUnitCost: Decimal
1252  begin
1253  CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options", "Over-Allowance Cost");
1254  case true of
1255  "Show calculated Sales Prices":
1256  CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."Configuration Price"
1257  + "Base Machine List Price"
1258  + "Equipment Price"
1259  + "Total Costs"
1260  + "Workshop Amount"
1261  - "Total Discount";
1262  "Show List Prices":
1263  CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price Conf. Options"
1264  + "Base Machine List Price"
1265  + "Equipment Price"
1266  + "Total Costs"
1267  + "Workshop Amount"
1268  - "Total Discount";
1269  else
1270  CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price"
1271  + "Equipment Price"
1272  + "Total Costs"
1273  + "Workshop Amount"
1274  - "Total Discount";
1275  end;
1276 
1277  if "Over-Allowance Cost" > 0 then
1278  CalculatedUnitCost += "Over-Allowance Cost";
1279  end;
1280 
1281  internal procedure GetCalculatedUnitPrice() CalculatedUnitPrice: Decimal
1282  begin
1283  CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Sales Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount");
1284  CalculatedUnitPrice := Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc()
1285  + "Equipment Price"
1286  + "Total Costs"
1287  + "Workshop Amount"
1288  - "Total Sales Discount";
1289  end;
1290 
1291  local procedure CheckAndFixMinimumMargin()
1292  var
1293  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1294  NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
1295  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
1296  begin
1297  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1298  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1299  if "Margin %" >= MinimumMargin then
1300  exit;
1301  "Margin %" := MinimumMargin;
1302  if "Sales Price" <= 0 then
1303  exit;
1304  if xRec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" <> Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" then
1305  exit;
1306  if "List Price" = 0 then
1307  exit;
1308  NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
1309  end;
1310 
1311  internal procedure CheckMargingSetToMinimumMargin()
1312  var
1313  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1314  NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
1315  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
1316  begin
1317  if "List Price" = 0 then
1318  exit;
1319  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1320  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1321  if ("Margin %" = MinimumMargin) and (xRec."Margin %" > Rec."Margin %") then
1322  NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
1323  end;
1324 
1325  procedure UpdateCalcSalesPrice()
1326  var
1327  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1328  begin
1329  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1330  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateCalcSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
1331  end;
1332 
1333  internal procedure UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice()
1334  var
1335  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1336  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1337  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
1338  begin
1339  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1340  if "Sales Price" = 0 then
1341  exit;
1342  if "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
1343  "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice();
1344  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
1345  "Margin Amount" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice() - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
1346  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), GetCalculatedUnitPrice());
1347  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1348  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1349  if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then begin
1350  if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Base Machine List Price") then
1351  "Base Machine List Price" := xRec."Base Machine List Price";
1352  UpdateListPrice();
1353  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
1354  end;
1355  end
1356  else begin
1357  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1358  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1359  if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
1360  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
1361  else begin
1362  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
1363  if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
1364  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
1365  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
1366  end;
1367  end;
1368  Rec.Modify();
1369  end;
1370 
1371  local procedure FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
1372  var
1373  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1374  begin
1375  CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
1376  "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
1377  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
1378  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
1379  end;
1380 
1381  internal procedure UpdateSalesPrice()
1382  var
1383  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1384  begin
1385  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1386  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
1387  UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
1388  end;
1389 
1390  local procedure UpdateCalcMarginPercentage()
1391  var
1392  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1393  MarginPercentage: Decimal;
1394  begin
1395  MarginPercentage := MarginSetup.GetMarginPercentage("Manufacturer Code", "Category Code", "Subcategory Code", "Series Code", "Model Code");
1396  Validate("Calculated Margin %", MarginPercentage);
1397  Validate("Margin %", MarginPercentage);
1398  end;
1399 
1400  local procedure TestSystemCreatedFalse()
1401  begin
1402  if not SkipCheckSystemCreated or StatusCheckSuspended then
1403  TestField("System-Created", false);
1404  end;
1405 
1406  local procedure TestMandatoryFields()
1407  var
1408  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
1409  begin
1410  TestField("Manufacturer Code");
1411  TestField("Category Code");
1412  TestField("Model Code");
1413  if ServiceMgt.IsSubcategoryMandatory() then
1414  TestField("Subcategory Code");
1415  if ServiceMgt.IsSeriesMandatory() then
1416  TestField("Series Code");
1417  end;
1418 
1419  local procedure CheckAttributesOnConfigurations()
1420  var
1421  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1422  AttributeChangeErr: Label '%1 cannot be changed since it is used in Configurations. Delete Configuration Lines in order to change %1.', Comment = '%1=Manufacturer Code/Category Code/Subcategory Code/Model Code';
1423  begin
1424  case CurrFieldNo of
1425  FieldNo("Manufacturer Code"):
1426  begin
1427  if xRec."Manufacturer Code" = '' then
1428  exit;
1429  if "Manufacturer Code" = xRec."Manufacturer Code" then
1430  exit;
1431  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1432  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Manufacturer Code", '<>%1', "Manufacturer Code");
1433  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1434  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1435  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Manufacturer Code"));
1436  end;
1437  FieldNo("Category Code"):
1438  begin
1439  if xRec."Category Code" = '' then
1440  exit;
1441  if "Category Code" = xRec."Category Code" then
1442  exit;
1443  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1444  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Category Code", '<>%1', "Category Code");
1445  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1446  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1447  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Category Code"));
1448  end;
1449  FieldNo("Subcategory Code"):
1450  begin
1451 
1452  if xRec."Subcategory Code" = '' then
1453  exit;
1454  if "Subcategory Code" = xRec."Subcategory Code" then
1455  exit;
1456  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1457  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Subcategory Code", '<>%1', "Subcategory Code");
1458  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1459  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1460  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Subcategory Code"));
1461  end;
1462  FieldNo("Series Code"):
1463  begin
1464  if xRec."Series Code" = '' then
1465  exit;
1466  if "Series Code" = xRec."Series Code" then
1467  exit;
1468  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1469  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Series Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
1470  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1471  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1472  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Series Code"));
1473  end;
1474  FieldNo("Model Code"):
1475  begin
1476  if xRec."Model Code" = '' then
1477  exit;
1478  if "Model Code" = xRec."Model Code" then
1479  exit;
1480  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1481  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Model Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
1482  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1483  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1484  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Model Code"));
1485  end;
1486  end;
1487  end;
1488 
1489  internal procedure SetCalculationCurrencyFromVendor(VendorNo: Code[20])
1490  var
1491  Vendor: Record Vendor;
1492  ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
1493  ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg: Label 'The vendor has the currency code %1. Do you want to use it in calculation worksheet?', Comment = '%1 - Vendor Currency Code';
1494  begin
1495  if not Vendor.Get(VendorNo) then
1496  exit;
1497  if Vendor."Currency Code" = '' then
1498  exit;
1499  if Vendor."Currency Code" = Rec."Calculation Currency" then
1500  exit;
1501  if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponse(StrSubstNo(ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg, Vendor."Currency Code")) then
1502  exit;
1503  Rec.Validate("Calculation Currency", Vendor."Currency Code");
1504  Rec.Modify();
1505  end;
1506 
1507  procedure SetDoNotTestStatusOpen(NewDoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean)
1508  begin
1509  DoNotTestStatusOpen := NewDoNotTestStatusOpen;
1510  end;
1511 
1512  procedure UpdateListPrice()
1513  var
1514  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1515  LineAmount: Decimal;
1516  begin
1517  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1518  CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount (List Price)");
1519  if "Show List Prices" then
1520  LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (List Price)"
1521  else
1522  LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
1523  Validate("List Price", LineAmount + "Base Machine List Price");
1524  OnAfterUpdateListPrice(Rec, LineAmount);
1525  end;
1526 
1527  internal procedure SetIncludesSalesDiscount(NewIncludesSalesDiscount: Boolean)
1528  begin
1529  if "Includes Sales Discount" = NewIncludesSalesDiscount then
1530  exit;
1531 
1532  Validate("Includes Sales Discount", NewIncludesSalesDiscount);
1533  Modify();
1534  end;
1535 
1536  internal procedure GetTotalPurchDiscountPercentage(): Decimal
1537  var
1538  CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
1539  begin
1540  CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1541  CalcPurchaseDiscounts.CalcSums("Absolute Discount %");
1542  exit(CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Absolute Discount %");
1543  end;
1544 
1545  internal procedure InitOrderType()
1546  var
1547  UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
1548  begin
1549  if not UserSetup.Get(UserId()) then
1550  exit;
1551  if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
1552  Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
1553  end;
1554 
1555  internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
1556  var
1557  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
1558  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
1559  begin
1560  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
1561  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
1562  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
1563  end;
1564 
1565  local procedure CheckIsReturnTypeEditable()
1566  var
1567  CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
1568  ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Return Type cannot be changed after Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document is created. Please first delete Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document if it is not posted.';
1569  begin
1570  CalcTradeInPurch.SetFilter("Document No.", '<>%1', '');
1571  CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1572  if not CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
1573  Error(ReturnTypeErr);
1574  end;
1575 
1576  local procedure TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(SalesCalculationOption: Text)
1577  var
1578  CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
1579  DiscountsErr: Label 'There are Sales Discounts defined. You have to delete them first to apply "%1"', Comment = '%1 - Configure Price Quote option you''re trying to apply';
1580  begin
1581  CalcSalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1582  if not CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
1583  Error(DiscountsErr, SalesCalculationOption);
1584  end;
1585 
1586  internal procedure EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields()
1587  var
1588  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1589  begin
1590  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1591  if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1592  exit;
1593 
1594  CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Price", 0);
1595  CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Amount", 0);
1596  end;
1597 
1598  procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices()
1599  var
1600  Currency: Record Currency;
1601  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1602  PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
1603  PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
1604  SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
1605  SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
1606  begin
1607  if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
1608  exit;
1609  if "List Price" = 0 then
1610  exit;
1611  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1612  Currency.Initialize('');
1613  GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1614  if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
1615  exit;
1616  SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
1617  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1618  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
1619  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
1620  if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1621  exit;
1622  UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1623 
1624  if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
1625  SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
1626  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
1627  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
1628  CalcConfiguration.Modify();
1629  end;
1630  end;
1631 
1632  internal procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices(var CurrCalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
1633  var
1634  Currency: Record Currency;
1635  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1636  PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
1637  PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
1638  SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
1639  SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
1640  begin
1641  if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
1642  exit;
1643  if "List Price" = 0 then
1644  exit;
1645  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1646  Currency.Initialize('');
1647  GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1648  if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
1649  exit;
1650  SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
1651  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1652  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', CurrCalcConfiguration."No.");
1653  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
1654  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
1655  if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1656  exit;
1657  UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1658 
1659  if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
1660  SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
1661  CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
1662  CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CurrCalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
1663  CurrCalcConfiguration.Modify();
1664  end;
1665  end;
1666 
1667  local procedure GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(var PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal; var SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal; var PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
1668  var
1669  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1670  begin
1671  CalcFields("Total Discount", "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options");
1672  if "Show List Prices" then
1673  PriceWithoutMargin := "List Price Conf. Options" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount"
1674  else
1675  PriceWithoutMargin := "Configuration Price" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount";
1676 
1677  SalesPriceWithMargin := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(PriceWithoutMargin,
1678  "Margin %",
1679  SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1680  if (SalesPriceWithMargin = 0) or ("List Price" = 0) then begin
1681  "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := 0;
1682  exit;
1683  end;
1684  if "Total Discount" <> 0 then
1685  PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1 - "Total Discount" / ("Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
1686  else
1687  PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1;
1688 
1689  "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1690  end;
1691 
1692  local procedure UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; var SalesPriceSplitTotal: Decimal; PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
1693  var
1694  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1695  begin
1696  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", true);
1697  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
1698  CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
1699  repeat
1700  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1701  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
1702  CalcConfiguration.Modify();
1703  SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
1704  until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
1705  end;
1706 
1707  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", false);
1708  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
1709  CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
1710  repeat
1711  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1712  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
1713  CalcConfiguration.Modify();
1714  SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
1715  until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
1716  end;
1717  end;
1718 
1719  internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup()
1720  var
1721  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1722  begin
1723  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
1724  exit;
1725  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
1726  PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, true);
1727  end;
1728 
1729  internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
1730  begin
1731  PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, false);
1732  end;
1733 
1734  local procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; ExecuteValidate: Boolean)
1735  var
1736  Item: Record Item;
1737  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
1738  VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
1739  begin
1740  if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
1741  exit;
1742  if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then begin
1743  Clear(Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
1744  exit;
1745  end;
1746  ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
1747  if not Item.Get(ServiceItem."Item No.") then
1748  exit;
1749 
1750  VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
1751  if ExecuteValidate then
1752  Rec.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group")
1753  else
1754  Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group" := Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group";
1755 
1756  UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
1757  end;
1758 
1759  local procedure UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup")
1760  var
1761  VATCalculationTypeErr: Label 'Calculation Type Full VAT in VAT Posting Setup is not possible in Configure Price Quote';
1762  begin
1763  case VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type" of
1764  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Reverse Charge VAT",
1765  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Sales Tax":
1766  "VAT %" := 0;
1767  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Normal VAT":
1768  "VAT %" := VATPostingSetup."VAT %";
1769  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Full VAT":
1770  Error(VATCalculationTypeErr);
1771  end;
1772  UpdateVATAmount();
1773  UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
1774  end;
1775 
1776  internal procedure UpdateVAT()
1777  var
1778  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1779  VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
1780  begin
1781  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
1782  exit;
1783  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
1784  if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
1785  exit;
1786  if not VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group") then
1787  exit;
1788  UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
1789  end;
1790 
1791  local procedure UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT()
1792  begin
1793  "Sales Price incl. VAT" := "Sales Price" * (1 + "VAT %" / 100);
1794  end;
1795 
1796  local procedure UpdateVATAmount()
1797  begin
1798  "VAT Amount" := "Sales Price" * ("VAT %" / 100);
1799  end;
1800 
1801  local procedure SetCalculationCurrency()
1802  var
1803  Manufacturer: Record Manufacturer;
1804  begin
1805  if "Manufacturer Code" = '' then begin
1806  Clear("Calculation Currency");
1807  exit;
1808  end;
1809  Manufacturer.Get("Manufacturer Code");
1810  if ("Sales Currency" = Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code") and
1811  (Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '') then
1812  Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
1813  if Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '' then
1814  Validate("Calculation Currency", Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code");
1815  end;
1816 
1817  internal procedure PrefillSalesCurrency()
1818  var
1819  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1820  begin
1821  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
1822  exit;
1823  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
1824  if (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" = "Calculation Currency") and (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" <> '') then
1825  Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
1826  Validate("Sales Currency", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency");
1827  Validate("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate");
1828  end;
1829 
1830  local procedure UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier()
1831  var
1832  CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
1833  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1834  CurrSalesPrice: Decimal;
1835  ExchangeRate: Decimal;
1836  PriceMultuplier: Decimal;
1837  xExchangeRate: Decimal;
1838  begin
1839  if Rec."Calculation Currency" = xRec."Calculation Currency" then
1840  exit;
1841  ExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
1842  xExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), xRec."Calculation Currency");
1843 
1844  if (ExchangeRate = 0) or (xExchangeRate = 0) then
1845  exit;
1846 
1847  PriceMultuplier := ExchangeRate / xExchangeRate;
1848  if PriceMultuplier = 1 then
1849  exit;
1850  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateAllForecastPricesWithMultiplier(Rec."No.", PriceMultuplier);
1851  CurrSalesPrice := "Sales Price";
1852  "Base Machine List Price" := "Base Machine List Price" * PriceMultuplier;
1853  UpdateListPrice();
1854  CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
1855  UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
1856  Validate("Sales Price", CurrSalesPrice * PriceMultuplier);
1857  end;
1858 
1859  local procedure CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate()
1860  var
1861  CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
1862  SeparateWorkshopErr: Label 'There are Services with "Calculate Separately" defined. You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
1863  begin
1864  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1865  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Calculate Separately", true);
1866  if not CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
1867  Error(SeparateWorkshopErr);
1868  end;
1869 
1870  local procedure CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate()
1871  var
1872  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
1873  SeparateEquipmentErr: Label 'There are Additional Configurations with "Calculate Separately" defined. You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
1874  begin
1875  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1876  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Calculate Separately", true);
1877  if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
1878  Error(SeparateEquipmentErr);
1879  end;
1880 
1881  internal procedure ReInitOrderTypeAndResponsibilityCenter()
1882  var
1883  CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
1884  begin
1885  CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
1886  if CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
1887  exit;
1888  CalcTradeInPurch.FindSet(true);
1889  repeat
1890  CalcTradeInPurch.InitOrderType();
1891  CalcTradeInPurch.InitResponsibilityCenter();
1892  CalcTradeInPurch.Modify(true);
1893  until CalcTradeInPurch.Next() = 0;
1894  end;
1895 
1896  procedure UpdateAllPriceRelatedFields()
1897  begin
1898  UpdateListPrice();
1899  UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
1900  UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
1901  end;
1902 
1903  local procedure UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC()
1904  var
1905  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1906  begin
1907  Validate("Calculated Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calculated Sales Price"));
1908  end;
1909 
1910  internal procedure UpdateSalesPriceSCC()
1911  var
1912  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1913  begin
1914  Validate("Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price"));
1915  end;
1916 
1917  local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromSCC()
1918  var
1919  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1920  begin
1921  Validate("Sales Price", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price (SCC)"));
1922  end;
1923 
1924  local procedure PrefillCalcExchangeRate()
1925  var
1926  CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
1927  LatestDate: Date;
1928  ExchangeRateAmount: Decimal;
1929  begin
1930  if "Calculation Currency" = '' then begin
1931  Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", 1);
1932  exit;
1933  end;
1934  CurrencyExchangeRate.GetLastestExchangeRate("Calculation Currency", LatestDate, ExchangeRateAmount);
1935  Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", ExchangeRateAmount);
1936  end;
1937 
1938  local procedure GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode: Text; Currency: Code[10]): Text
1939  var
1940  GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
1941  begin
1942  if Currency = '' then
1943  exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
1944  GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
1945  if Currency = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code" then
1946  exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
1947  exit(StrSubstNo('%1 (%2)', CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode, Currency));
1948  end;
1949 
1950  local procedure CheckServItemCalculation()
1951  var
1952  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1953  ServItemCalcErr: Label 'There already exist a Service Item Calculation Worksheet for Service Item No. %1', Comment = '%1 Service Item No.';
1954  begin
1955  if not Rec."Service Item Calculation" then
1956  exit;
1957  if CalcForecastMgt.HasServiceItemCalculation(Rec."Service Item No.") then
1958  Error(ServItemCalcErr, Rec."Service Item No.");
1959  end;
1960 
1961  procedure CreatePurchaseOrder()
1962  var
1963  CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
1964  begin
1965  CalcForecastToPurch.CreatePurchaseOrder(Rec);
1966  end;
1967 
1968  procedure OpenPurchaseDocument()
1969  var
1970  CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
1971  begin
1972  CalcForecastToPurch.OpenPurchaseDocument(Rec."Purchase Document Type", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
1973  end;
1974 
1975  procedure OpenListOfPOs()
1976  var
1977  PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
1978  begin
1979  if not Rec.Template then
1980  exit;
1981  PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(2);
1982  PurchaseHeader.SetRange("Document Type", PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order);
1983  PurchaseHeader.SetRange("TSRD Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
1984  PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(0);
1985  Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order List", PurchaseHeader);
1986  end;
1987 
1988  internal procedure CopyUnitCostOfServiceItem()
1989  var
1990  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
1991  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
1992  UnitCost: Decimal;
1993  begin
1994  if "Service Item No." = '' then begin
1995  if CheckLinkedDocument() then
1996  SetBaseMachinePrice(0);
1997  exit;
1998  end;
1999  ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
2000  ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
2001  if not GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice() then
2002  SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
2003  end;
2004 
2005  local procedure CheckLinkedDocument(): Boolean
2006  var
2007  PurchInvLine: Record "Purch. Inv. Line";
2008  PurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line";
2009  begin
2010  if (xRec."Service Item No." = '') or (Rec."Purchase Document No." = '') then
2011  exit(true);
2012  PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document Type", "Purchase Document Type"::Order);
2013  PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
2014  PurchaseLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");
2015 
2016  PurchInvLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
2017  PurchInvLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");
2018  if PurchaseLine.IsEmpty() and PurchInvLine.IsEmpty() then
2019  exit(true);
2020  end;
2021 
2022  internal procedure HandleEquipment()
2023  var
2024  EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
2025  begin
2026  EquipmentMgt.TransferStandardEquipmentAndModel(Rec, xRec);
2027  EquipmentMgt.DeleteForecastEquipmentOnServItemNoValidate(Rec, xRec);
2028  EquipmentMgt.DeleteServiceItemLinkedEquipment(Rec);
2029  EquipmentMgt.CopyServiceItemEquipmentToForecast(Rec);
2030  EquipmentMgt.ServiceItemEquipmentToStandardEquipment(Rec);
2031  end;
2032 
2033  local procedure SetBaseMachinePrice(NewBasePrice: Decimal)
2034  var
2035  Margin: Decimal;
2036  begin
2037  Margin := "Margin %";
2038  Validate("Base Machine List Price", NewBasePrice);
2039  Validate("Margin %", Margin);
2040  end;
2041 
2042  internal procedure SetBaseMachineListPrice()
2043  var
2044  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
2045  ConfirmMgt: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
2046  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
2047  UnitCost: Decimal;
2048  ConfirmLbl: Label 'Calculation Review is not approved. When creating a Calculation Worksheet, the Base Machine List Price will be set to ''0'', do you want to continue?';
2049  begin
2050  if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then
2051  exit;
2052  ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
2053  SalesReceivablesSetup.GetRecordOnce();
2054  case SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Base Machine List Price" of
2055  "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Unit Cost of Service Item":
2056  ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
2057  "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Calculation Unit Cost":
2058  if not (ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Review Status" in [
2059  "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::Approved,
2060  "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::"No Calc. Review Required"
2061  ])
2062  then begin
2063  if not ConfirmMgt.GetResponse(ConfirmLbl) then
2064  Error('')
2065  else
2066  UnitCost := 0
2067  end else
2068  UnitCost := ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Unit Cost";
2069  end;
2070  SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
2071  end;
2072 
2073  internal procedure TestStatusOpenSalesCalc()
2074  var
2075  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
2076  begin
2077  CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("No.", Rec.GetFilter("Calc. Sales Forecast No."));
2078  CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("Version No.", Rec.GetFilter("Version No."));
2079  if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
2080  exit;
2081  CalcSalesForecast.FindFirst();
2082  CalcSalesForecast.TestStatusOpen();
2083  end;
2084 
2085  internal procedure SetStatusCheckSuspended(Suspend: Boolean)
2086  begin
2087  StatusCheckSuspended := Suspend;
2088  end;
2089 
2090  internal procedure GetStatusCheckSuspended(): Boolean
2091  begin
2092  exit(StatusCheckSuspended);
2093  end;
2094 
2095  internal procedure SetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(Skip: Boolean)
2096  begin
2097  SkipBaseMachineListPrice := Skip;
2098  end;
2099 
2100  internal procedure GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(): Boolean
2101  begin
2102  exit(SkipBaseMachineListPrice);
2103  end;
2104

2106  begin
2107  SkipRelatedActivities := Skip;
2108  end;
2109 
2110  internal procedure GetSkipRelatedActivities(): Boolean
2111  begin
2112  exit(SkipRelatedActivities);
2113  end;

2119  if not CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") then
2120  exit("TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::" ");
2121  exit(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Calculation Status");
2122  end;

2124  protected var
2125  SkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean;
2126  SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean;
2127 
2128  var

2130  NoSeries: Codeunit "No. Series";
2131  DoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean;
2132  FromCPQDelete: Boolean;
2133  SkipBaseMachineListPrice: Boolean;
2134  SkipRelatedActivities: Boolean;
2135  StatusCheckSuspended: Boolean;
2136  CalculatedMarginLbl: Label 'Calc. ';
2137  MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr: Label 'Margin too low. Reseting to minimum margin';
2138  SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr: Label 'You can''t set up the same value for Sales and Calculation Currency.';

+30 −2
1 page 5446016 "TSRD Calc. Forecast FactBox"
2 {
3  Caption = 'Worksheet Calculations';
4  PageType = CardPart;
5  SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
6 
7  layout
8  {
9  area(Content)
10  {
11  group(GroupName)
12  {
13  ShowCaption = false;
14  label(PurchaseCostsLabel)
15  {
16  ApplicationArea = All;
17  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(PurchaseCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
18  Style = Strong;
19  }
20  field("Base Machine List Price"; Rec."Base Machine List Price")
21  {
22  ApplicationArea = All;
23  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Base Machine List Price"), Rec."No.");
24  ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Machine List Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
25  }
26  field("Configuration Price"; Rec."Configuration Price")
27  {
28  ApplicationArea = All;
29  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
30  }
31  field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
32  {
33  ApplicationArea = All;
34  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the List Price field';
35  }
36  field("Total Discount"; Rec."Total Discount")
37  {
38  ApplicationArea = All;
39  Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
40  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Discount"), Rec."No.");
41  ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Discount Amounts from all Purchase discount lines.';
42  }
43  field("Equipment Price"; Rec."Equipment Price")
44  {
45  ApplicationArea = All;
46  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment Price"), Rec."No.");
47  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Total Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price field';
48  }
49  field("Workshop Amount"; Rec."Workshop Amount")
50  {
51  ApplicationArea = All;
52  Caption = 'Service';
53  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Workshop Amount"), Rec."No.");
54  ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Service Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
55  }
56  field("Total Costs"; Rec."Total Costs")
57  {
58  ApplicationArea = All;
59  Caption = 'Costs';
60  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Costs"), Rec."No.");
61  ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
62  }
63  group(OverAllowance)
64  {
65  ShowCaption = false;
66  Visible = (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In") or (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::Purchase) or ShowOverAllowancePrice;
67  field("Over-Allowance Cost"; Rec."Over-Allowance Cost")
68  {
69  ApplicationArea = All;
70  Caption = 'Over-Allowance Cost';
71  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Over-Allowance Cost field';
72  trigger OnDrillDown()
73  var
74  OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
75  begin
76  OverAllowanceMgt.DrillDownOnForecastFactbox(Rec."No.");
77  end;
78  }
79  }
80  field(CalculatedUnitCosts; CalculatedUnitCosts)
81  {
82  ApplicationArea = All;
83  Caption = 'Calculated Unit Costs';
84  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(CalculatedUnitCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
85  Style = Strong;
86  ToolTip = 'Specifies Calculated Unit Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
87  }
88  field("List Price Conf. Options"; Rec."List Price Conf. Options")
89  {
90  ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
91  ToolTip = 'Sum of all Configuration Options List Price Amounts.';
92  Visible = false;
93  }
94  }
95  group(Sales)
96  {
97  ShowCaption = false;
98  Visible = Rec."Includes Sales Discount";
99 
100  label(SalesLabel)
101  {
102  ApplicationArea = All;
103  Caption = 'Sales';
104  Style = Strong;
105  }
106  field("Sales Base Machine List Price"; Rec.GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
107  {
108  ApplicationArea = All;
109  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Base Machine List Price"), Rec."No.");
110  ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Machine List Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
111  }
112  group(ConfigurationListPrice)
113  {
114  ShowCaption = false;
115  Visible = Rec."Show List Prices";
116 
117  field("Sales Configuration List Price"; Rec."List Price Conf. Options")
118  {
119  ApplicationArea = All;
120  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
121  }
122  }
123  group(ConfigurationPrice)
124  {
125  ShowCaption = false;
126  Visible = not Rec."Show List Prices";
127 
128  field("Sales Configuration Price"; Rec."Configuration Price")
129  {
130  ApplicationArea = All;
131  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
132  }
133  }
134  field("Sales List Price"; Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
135  {
136  ApplicationArea = All;
137  Caption = 'List Price';
138  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the List Price field';
139  }
140  field("Total Sales Discount"; Rec."Total Sales Discount")

351  var
352  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
353+ SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
354  ShowOverAllowancePrice: Boolean;
355  CalculatedUnitCosts: Decimal;
356  DirectCosts: Decimal;
357  PaymentAmt: Decimal;
358  PaymentAmtSCC: Decimal;
359  PurchaseTradeInAmt: Decimal;
360  SalesPriceWithoutSeparately: Decimal;
361  UnitPriceInclDiscounts: Decimal;
362  UnitPriceInclWorkshops: Decimal;
363+ TotalCostsAmount: Decimal;
364+ SalesPriceTotal: Decimal;
365+ TotalMarginPct: Decimal;
366+ TotalMargin: Decimal;
367  CalculatedUnitCostsLbl: Label 'Calculated Unit Costs';
368  PaymentAmountLbl: Label 'Payment Amount';
369  PurchaseCostsLbl: Label 'Purchase Costs';
370  SalesPriceWithoutSeparateLbl: Label 'Sales Price (without Separate)';
371 
372  trigger OnAfterGetRecord()
373  begin
374  CalcUnitPrices();
375  CurrPage.Update(false);
376  end;
377 
378  local procedure CalcUnitPrices()
379  begin
380  CalculatedUnitCosts := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
381  if Rec."Includes Sales Discount" then
382  SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitPrice()
383  else
384  SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
·- Rec.CalcFields("Equipment (Separate)", "Workshop (Separate)", "Over-Allowance Price");
385+ Rec.CalcFields("Equipment (Separate)", "Workshop (Separate)", "Over-Allowance Price", "Add. Config Price (Sep)", "Service Amount (Separate)", "Total Costs (Separate)", "Costs (Separate)");
386+
