387+ TotalCostsAmount := CalculatedUnitCosts + Rec."Add. Config Price (Sep)" + Rec."Service Amount (Separate)" + Rec."Total Costs (Separate)";
388+ SalesPriceTotal := Rec."Sales Price" + Rec."Equipment (Separate)" + Rec."Workshop (Separate)" + Rec."Costs (Separate)";
389+ TotalMargin := SalesPriceTotal - TotalCostsAmount;
390+
391+ if SalesPriceTotal <> 0 then begin
392+ SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
393+ TotalMarginPct := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", TotalCostsAmount, SalesPriceTotal);
394+ end else
395+ TotalMarginPct := 0;
396+
397  if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then begin
398  ShowOverAllowancePrice := true;
399  PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, true) + Rec."Over-Allowance Price";
400  end else begin
401  ShowOverAllowancePrice := false;
402  PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, false);
403  end;
404 
·- PaymentAmt := Rec."Sales Price" - PurchaseTradeInAmt + Rec."Equipment (Separate)" + Rec."Workshop (Separate)";
405+ PaymentAmt := SalesPriceTotal - PurchaseTradeInAmt;
406  PaymentAmtSCC := CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", Rec."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", PaymentAmt);
407  end;
408 
409  local procedure GetReturnCaption() Caption: Text
410  var
411  GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
412  OveraAllowanceLbl: Label 'Trade-In/Purchases';
413  PurchaseLbl: Label 'Purchases';
414  TradeInLbl: Label 'Trade-Ins';
415  CalculationCurrencySuffix: Text;
416  begin
417  if (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
418  CalculationCurrencySuffix := StrSubstNo(' (%1)', Rec."Calculation Currency");
419 
420  case Rec."Return Type" of
421  Rec."Return Type"::Purchase:
422  Caption := PurchaseLbl;
423  Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In":
424  exit(TradeInLbl + CalculationCurrencySuffix);
425  end;
426  Rec.CalcFields("Over-Allowance Price");
427  if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then
428  Caption := OveraAllowanceLbl;
429 
430  exit(Caption);
431  end;
432 }
+71 −3
1 codeunit 5446021 "TSRD Calc. Sales For.-To-Doc"
2 {
3  #region Global Procedure
4 
5  procedure ChooseOptionForDoc(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type"): Boolean
6  var
7  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
8  SalesInvHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
9  ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
10  IsHandled: Boolean;
11  OrderErr: Label 'It is not possible to create a new Sales %1 because an %2 %3 already exists for the Configure Price Quote.', Comment = '%1 = DocTypeToCreate, %2= Existing Type, %3= Existing No';
12  PostedSalesInvoiceLbl: Label 'Posted Sales Invoice';
13  SalesConfirmQst: Label 'Sales %1 %2 for Configure Price Quote already exists. \Do you want to update?', Comment = '%1= Document Type, %2 Document No.';
14  begin
15  if CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No." = '' then
16  exit;
17 
18  if SalesInvHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
19  Error(OrderErr, DocTypeToCreate, PostedSalesInvoiceLbl, SalesInvHeader."No.");
20 
21  if not SalesHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
22  exit;
23 
24  OnBeforeCheckForOrderType(CalcSalesForecast, SalesHeader, IsHandled);
25  if not IsHandled then
26  if SalesHeader."Document Type" in [DocTypeToCreate, SalesHeader."Document Type"::Invoice] then
27  if SalesHeader."Document Type" <> SalesHeader."Document Type"::Quote then
28  Error(OrderErr, DocTypeToCreate, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No.");
29 
30  if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(StrSubstNo(SalesConfirmQst, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No."), false) then
31  Error('');
32  SalesHeader.Delete(true);
33  CreateDocFromSalesForecast(CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
34  exit(true);
35  end;
36 
37  internal procedure DeleteSalesDocument(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
38  var
39  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
40  ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
41  DeleteQstErr: Label 'Delete %1 ∙ %2?', comment = '%1 Document No., %2 Vendor Name';
42  begin
43  if not SalesHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
44  exit;
45  if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(StrSubstNo(DeleteQstErr, SalesHeader."No.", SalesHeader."Sell-to Customer Name"), true) then
46  exit;
47  SalesHeader.Delete(true);
48  end;
49 
50  procedure CreateDocFromSalesForecast(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
51  var
52  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
53  CalcForecastArchiving: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Archiving";
54  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
55  InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
56  ArchiveReason: Enum "TSRD Calc. Archive Reason";
57  begin
58  CheckConditionsForCreateSalesDoc(CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
59  CreateSalesHeader(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
60  CreateSalesLines(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
61  CalculateSalesFixPrice(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
62  InflationSurchargeMgt.InsertInflationSurchargeCommentsAfterLinesInserted(SalesHeader);
63  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateDocumentForOpportunity(CalcSalesForecast."Opportunity No.", SalesHeader);
64  OnAfterCreateSalesDoc(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
65  if DocTypeToCreate = "Sales Document Type"::Order then
66  CalcForecastMgt.SetSalesCalculationStatus(SalesHeader, "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won);
67  OpenSalesDocumentPage(SalesHeader);
68  if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Quote then begin
69  ArchiveReason := ArchiveReason::"Sales Quote";
70  CalcForecastArchiving.ArchiveCalculation(CalcSalesForecast, ArchiveReason);
71  end;
72  end;
73 
74  local procedure OpenSalesDocumentPage(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
75  var
76  ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
77  PageManagement: Codeunit "Page Management";
78  NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
79  ShouldOpenPage: Boolean;
80  DocCreatedMsg: Label 'Sales %1 %2 has been created/updated! Do you want to open the document?', Comment = '%1= Sales Document Type, %2 is document no.';
81  begin
82  ShouldOpenPage := not NotificationManagement.ConfirmOpenNewDocumentIsEnabled();
83  if not ShouldOpenPage then
84  ShouldOpenPage := ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(
85  StrSubstNo(DocCreatedMsg, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No."),
86  false
87  );
88  if ShouldOpenPage then
89  PageManagement.PageRun(SalesHeader);
90  end;
91 
92  #endregion Global Procedure
93 
94  #region Internal Procedure
95  internal procedure UpdateSalesForecastBeforeDeleteDoc(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
96  var
97  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
98  begin
99  if not RunTrigger then
100  exit;
101 
102  if SalesHeader.IsTemporary() then
103  exit;
104  CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", SalesHeader."No.");
105  if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
106  exit;
107 
108  if CheckIfDocIsPartialPosting(SalesHeader) then begin
109  CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type"::Invoice);
110  CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. No.", GetPostedInvoiceNo(SalesHeader));
111  exit;
112  end;
113 
114  CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type"::Quote);
115  CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. No.", '');
116  end;
117 
118  internal procedure UpdateForecastAfterConvertQuote(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; NewSalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
119  var
120  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
121  CalcSalesForecast2: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
122  begin
123  if SalesHeader.IsTemporary() then
124  exit;
125 
126  CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", SalesHeader."No.");
127  if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
128  exit;
129 
130  CalcSalesForecast.FindSet();
131  repeat
132  CalcSalesForecast2.Get(CalcSalesForecast."No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
133  CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. Type" := NewSalesHeader."Document Type";
134  CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := NewSalesHeader."No.";
135  CalcSalesForecast2.ReleaseSalesForecast();
136  until CalcSalesForecast.Next() = 0;
137  end;
138 
139  internal procedure UpdateForecastAfterPostingRelatedInvoiceCompletely(DocumentType: Enum "Sales Document Type"; DocumentNo: Code[20]; NewDocumentNo: Code[20])
140  var
141  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
142  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
143  CalcSalesForecast2: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
144  begin
145  if SalesHeader.Get(DocumentType, DocumentNo) then
146  exit;
147 
148  CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", DocumentNo);
149  if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
150  exit;
151 
152  CalcSalesForecast.FindSet();
153  repeat
154  CalcSalesForecast2.Get(CalcSalesForecast."No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
155  CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := NewDocumentNo;
156  CalcSalesForecast2.Modify();
157  until CalcSalesForecast.Next() = 0;
158  end;
159 
160  internal procedure SkipStatusForReturnLine(ReservationEntry: Record "Reservation Entry"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
161  var
162  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
163  begin
164  if ReservationEntry."Source Subtype" <> ReservationEntry."Source Subtype"::"0" then
165  exit;
166  if not SalesLine.Get("Sales Document Type"::Quote, ReservationEntry."Source ID", ReservationEntry."Source Ref. No.") then
167  exit;
168  if SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" then
169  IsHandled := true;
170  end;
171 
172  internal procedure SkipPriceCalcForForecast(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var Handled: Boolean)
173  var
174  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
175  begin
176  SalesHeader.SetAutoCalcFields("TSRD Sales Forecast Exists");
177  if not SalesHeader.Get(SalesLine."Document Type", SalesLine."Document No.") then
178  exit;
179  if SalesHeader."TSRD Sales Forecast Exists" then
180  Handled := true;
181  end;
182 
183  #endregion Internal Procedure
184 
185  #region Local Procedures
186 
187  local procedure CheckConditionsForCreateSalesDoc(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
188  var
189  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
190  EmptyForecastLinesErr: Label 'You cannot create Sales %1 without valid %2.', Comment = '%1 = DocTypeToCreate, %2 is Configure Price Quote lines';
191  NoCustomerOrContactWithTemplErr: Label 'Either Customer No. or Contact No. need to be filled in order to create Sales Quote.';
192  begin
193  CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
194  CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
195  CalcForecast.SetFilter(Status, '<>%1', CalcSalesForecast.Status::Alternative);
196  if (CalcSalesForecast."Customer No." = '') then
197  if (CalcSalesForecast."Contact No." = '') then
198  Error(NoCustomerOrContactWithTemplErr);
199  if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
200  Error(EmptyForecastLinesErr, DocTypeToCreate, CalcForecast.TableCaption());
201 
202  GetCalcForecast(CalcForecast);
203  CheckMandatoryFieldForWorkshops(CalcForecast);
204  end;
205 
206  internal procedure CheckIfDocIsPartialPosting(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Boolean
207  var
208  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
209  begin
210  SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
211  SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
212  SalesLine.SetFilter("Quantity Invoiced", '<>%1', 0);
213  exit(not SalesLine.IsEmpty());
214  end;
215 
216  local procedure GetPostedInvoiceNo(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Code[20]
217  var
218  SalesInvoiceHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
219  begin
220  SalesHeader.SetCurrentKey("Posting Date");
221  SalesInvoiceHeader.SetRange("Order No.", SalesHeader."No.");
222  SalesInvoiceHeader.FindLast();
223  exit(SalesInvoiceHeader."No.");
224  end;
225 
226  local procedure GetCalcForecast(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
227  begin
228  CalcForecast.FindSet();
229  repeat
230  CheckPurchDiscounts(CalcForecast."No.");
231  until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
232  end;
233 
234  local procedure CheckPurchDiscounts(ForecastNo: Code[20])
235  var
236  CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
237  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
238  begin
239  CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", ForecastNo);
240  if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
241  exit;
242  CalcForecastMgt.SetPurchDiscountStatus(CalcPurchaseDiscounts, WorkDate());
243  CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange(Status, CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Status::Expired);
244  if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
245  exit;
246  CalcForecastMgt.DeleteExpiredPurchaseDiscounts(CalcPurchaseDiscounts, true);
247  CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange(Status);
248  CalcForecastMgt.CalculateForecastPrice(ForecastNo);
249  end;
250 
251  local procedure CreateSalesHeader(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
252  begin
253  Clear(SalesHeader);
254  SalesHeader."No." := CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.";
255  SalesHeader.Validate("Document Type", DocTypeToCreate);
256  SalesHeader.Validate("TSRD Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
257  SalesHeader.Validate("TSRD Sales Fore. Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
258  SalesHeader.Insert(true);
259  SalesHeader.SetHideValidationDialog(true);
260  if CalcSalesForecast."Sales Order Type" <> '' then
261  SalesHeader.Validate("TSR Sales Order Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Order Type");
262  if CalcSalesForecast."Customer No." <> '' then
263  SalesHeader.Validate("Sell-to Customer No.", CalcSalesForecast."Customer No.");
264  if CalcSalesForecast."Contact No." <> '' then
265  SalesHeader.Validate("Sell-to Contact No.", CalcSalesForecast."Contact No.");
266  if CalcSalesForecast."Responsibility Center" <> '' then
267  SalesHeader.Validate("Responsibility Center", CalcSalesForecast."Responsibility Center");
268  if CalcSalesForecast."Person in Charge" <> '' then
269  SalesHeader.Validate("TSR Person In Charge", CalcSalesForecast."Person in Charge");
270  if CalcSalesForecast."Valid Until" <> 0D then
271  SalesHeader."Quote Valid Until Date" := CalcSalesForecast."Valid Until";
272  TransferBillToDetails(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
273  if CalcSalesForecast.Salesperson <> '' then
274  SalesHeader.Validate("Salesperson Code", CalcSalesForecast.Salesperson);
275  SalesHeader.SetHideValidationDialog(false);
276  SetCurrencyCodeFromCalcForecast(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate");
277  if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Order then
278  SalesHeader.Validate("Posting Date", WorkDate());
279  SalesHeader.Modify(true);
280  end;
281 
282  local procedure TransferBillToDetails(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
283  begin
284  if (CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Customer No." = '') then
285  exit;
286  SalesHeader.Validate("Bill-to Customer No.", CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Customer No.");
287  SalesHeader."Bill-to Name" := CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Name";
288  end;
289 
290  local procedure CalculateSalesFixPrice(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
291  var
292  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
293  FixPrice: Record "TSRD Fix Price";
294  FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
295  FAAmount: Decimal;
296  PartsAmount: Decimal;
297  begin
298  if not CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
299  exit;
300  SalesHeader.SetStatus(SalesHeader.Status::Released);
301  SalesHeader.Modify(true);
302  FixPrice.InitRecord("TSRD Fix Price Provider"::"Sales Line",
303  FixPriceMgt.GetFixPriceDocumentType(SalesHeader."Document Type"), SalesHeader."No.",
304  0, SalesHeader."No.");
305  PartsAmount := GetLineAmount(SalesLine, SalesHeader, SalesLine.Type::Item);
306  FAAmount := GetLineAmount(SalesLine, SalesHeader, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset");
307  FixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := PartsAmount;
308  FixPrice."Total Price Parts" := PartsAmount;
309  FixPrice."Fix Price Fixed Asset" := FAAmount;
310  FixPrice."Total Price Fixed Asset" := FAAmount;
311  FixPrice."Total Price Amount" := PartsAmount + FAAmount;
312  FixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := PartsAmount + FAAmount;
313  CalcSalesForecast.CalcFields("Total Sales Price (Fix Price)");
314  FixPrice."Total Sales Price" := CalcSalesForecast."Total Sales Price (Fix Price)";
315  FixPrice.Difference := FixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" - FixPrice."Total Sales Price";
316  FixPriceMgt.CalculateFixPrice(FixPrice);
317  end;
318 
319  local procedure GetLineAmount(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; Type: Enum "Sales Line Type"): Decimal
320  begin
321  SalesLine.Reset();
322  SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
323  SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
324  SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
325  SalesLine.SetRange(Type, Type);
326  SalesLine.CalcSums("Line Amount");
327  exit(SalesLine."Line Amount");
328  end;
329 
330  local procedure CreateSalesLines(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
331  var
332  FixedAsset: Record "Fixed Asset";
333  Item: Record Item;
334  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
335  MainSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
336  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
337  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
338  MachineCommSalesMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Comm. Sales Mgt";
339  ServiceItemDataMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
340  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
341  AddEmptyLine: Boolean;
342  i: Integer;
343  LineNo: Integer;
344  begin
345  CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
346  CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
347  CalcForecast.SetFilter(Status, '<>%1', CalcSalesForecast.Status::Alternative);
348  CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Sort No.");
349  if CalcForecast.FindSet() then
350  repeat
351  for i := 1 to CalcForecast.Quantity do begin
352  if AddEmptyLine then
353  CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine)
354  else
355  AddEmptyLine := true;
356  CalcForecast.CalcFields("Equipment (Separate)");
357  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
358  if CalcForecast."Service Item No." <> '' then
359  ServiceMgt.UpdateServiceItem(CalcForecast);
360  GetTypeFromCalcForecast(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
361  case SalesLine.Type of
362  SalesLine.Type::Item:
363  begin
364  GetItemFromCalcForecast(Item, CalcForecast);
365  SalesLine.Validate("No.", Item."No.");
366  end;
367  SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset":
368  begin
369  GetFAFromCalcForecast(FixedAsset, CalcForecast);
370  SalesLine.Validate("No.", FixedAsset."No.");
371  end;
372  end;
373  SalesLine.Insert(true);
374  SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
375  if CalcForecast."Service Item No." <> '' then begin
376  SalesLine.TSRMSetSkipInsertServiceItemEquipment(CheckIfEquipmentExistOnForecast(CalcForecast."No."));
377  SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
378  end;
379  if SalesLine.Type = SalesLine.Type::Item then begin
380  SalesLine.GetUnitCost();
381  SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecast."No.");
382  end;
383  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Fore. Serv. Item" := true;
384  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast No." := CalcForecast."No.";
385  SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
386  CheckOptionOnForecastAndGetMachinePrice(CalcSalesForecast, CalcForecast, SalesLine);
387  SalesLine.Validate("Location Code", CalcForecast."Location Code");
388  CalcForecastMgt.SalesLineAssignBinCode(SalesLine, CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
389  OnBeforeModifySalesLine(SalesLine);
390  SalesLine.Modify(true);
391  MainSalesLine := SalesLine;
392  ServiceItemDataMgt.FillServiceItemData(SalesLine);
393  MachineCommSalesMgt.CreateOrUpdateSalesLink(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
394  CreateSalesLinesFromStandardEquipment(CalcForecast."No.", SalesHeader, SalesLine, MainSalesLine);
395  CreateSalesLinesExtText(SalesLine, SalesHeader, LineNo);
396  CreateSalesLinesFromConfiguration(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
397  CreateSalesLinesFromSalesDiscounts(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
398  CreateSalesLinesFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
399  CreateSalesLinesFromWorkshop(CalcForecast, SalesHeader);
400+ CreateSalesLinesFromCost(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, MainSalesLine);
401  if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Quote then
402  CreateSalesLinesFromTradeInPurch(CalcForecast."No.", SalesHeader, CalcForecast);
403  end;
404  until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
405  CalcSalesForecast.Find();
406  CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No." := SalesHeader."No.";
407  CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type" := SalesHeader."Document Type";
408  CalcSalesForecast.Modify();
409  end;
410 
411  local procedure CheckIfEquipmentExistOnForecast(CalcForecastNo: Code[20]): Boolean
412  var
413  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
414  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
415  begin
416  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
417  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Linked to Service Item", true);
418  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
419  exit(true);
420  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
421  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Linked to Service Item", true);
422  exit(not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty());
423  end;
424 
425  local procedure SetFixedPriceOnLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
426  var
427  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
428  begin
429  if not CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
430  exit;
431  SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
432  SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
433  SalesLine.SetFilter(Type, '<>%1', SalesLine.Type::" ");
434  SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
435  SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);
436 
437  if not SalesLine.IsEmpty() then
438  SalesLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fixed Price", true);
439  end;
440 
441  local procedure CheckOptionOnForecastAndGetMachinePrice(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
442  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
443  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
444  var
445  Currency: Record Currency;
446  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
447  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
448  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
449+ NetEquipPrice: Decimal;
450+ NetWorkshopAmt: Decimal;
451+ NetTotalCosts: Decimal;
452  begin
·- CalcForecast.CalcFields("Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Total Costs", "Configuration Sales Price");
453+ CalcForecast.CalcFields("Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Total Costs", "Configuration Sales Price", "Equipment (Separate)", "Service Amount (Separate)", "Total Costs (Separate)");
454+ NetEquipPrice := CalcForecast."Equipment Price" - CalcForecast."Equipment (Separate)";
455+ NetWorkshopAmt := CalcForecast."Workshop Amount" - CalcForecast."Service Amount (Separate)";
456+ NetTotalCosts := CalcForecast."Total Costs" - CalcForecast."Total Costs (Separate)";
457+
458  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
459  Currency.Initialize(CalcForecast."Sales Currency");
460  if CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then begin
461  if SetFixPriceFields(SalesLine, CalcForecast) then begin
462  SalesLine."Line Discount %" := 0;
463  if CalcForecast."Service Item In Stock As" = CalcForecast."Service Item In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset" then
464  CalculateFixPriceUnitPrice(CalcForecast, SalesLine, CalcForecast."FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)")
465  else
466  CalculateFixPriceUnitPrice(CalcForecast, SalesLine, CalcForecast."Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)");
467  end else begin
·- SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcForecast."Sales Price" - CalcForecast."Equipment (Separate)");
468+ SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcForecast."Sales Price" - CalcForecast."Equipment (Separate)" - CalcForecast."Workshop (Separate)" - CalcForecast."Costs (Separate)");
469  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
470  end;
471  exit;
472  end;
473  case true of
474  CalcForecast."Show List Prices":
475  begin
476  FilterCalcConfigurationOptions(CalcForecast, CalcConfiguration);
477  CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (List Price)");
478  SalesLine.Validate(
479  "Unit Price",
480  CalcForecast.GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() +
·- CalcForecast."Workshop Amount" +
·- CalcForecast."Equipment Price" +
·- CalcForecast."Total Costs" +
481+ NetWorkshopAmt +
482+ NetEquipPrice +
483+ NetTotalCosts +
484  CalcConfiguration.GetLineAmountForSalesPriceCalc()
485  );
486  end;
487  CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices":
488  begin
489  FilterCalcConfigurationOptions(CalcForecast, CalcConfiguration);
490  CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Calculated Sales Amount");
491  SalesLine.Validate(
492  "Unit Price",
493  CalcForecast."Calculated Machine Sales Price" +
494  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" +
495  Round(
496  CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(
·- CalcForecast."Equipment Price" +
·- CalcForecast."Workshop Amount" +
·- CalcForecast."Total Costs",
497+ NetEquipPrice +
498+ NetWorkshopAmt +
499+ NetTotalCosts,
500  CalcForecast."Margin %",
501  SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"
502  ),
503  Currency."Amount Rounding Precision"
504  )
505  );
506  end;
507  else
508  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CheckIfSalesDiscountsAreDefinedAndCalculateUnitPrice(CalcForecast));
509  end;
510  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
511  end;
512 
513  local procedure FilterCalcConfigurationOptions(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
514  var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
515  begin
516  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
517  CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment);
518  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Item Charge", '');
519  end;
520 
521  local procedure CalculateFixPriceUnitPrice(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; FixPriceAmount: Decimal)
522  var
523  Currency: Record Currency;
524  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
525  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
526  SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice: Decimal;
527  SalesLineUnitPrice: Decimal;
528  begin
529  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
530  Currency.Initialize(CalcForecast."Sales Currency");
531  case true of
532  CalcForecast."Show List Prices":
533  begin
534  SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice := CalcForecast.GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() +
535  CalcForecast."Equipment Price" +
536  CalcForecast."Total Costs" +
537  CalcForecast."Workshop Amount";
538  SalesLineUnitPrice := Round(FixPriceAmount - CalculateItemConfigurationDirectUnitCost(CalcForecast), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
539  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice);
540  CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(SalesLine,
541  SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice,
542  SalesLineUnitPrice);
543  end;
544  CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices":
545  begin
546  SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice := CalcForecast."Calculated Machine Sales Price" +
547  Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcForecast."Equipment Price" + CalcForecast."Total Costs" + CalcForecast."Workshop Amount",
548  CalcForecast."Margin %",
549  SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"),
550  Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
551  SalesLineUnitPrice := Round(FixPriceAmount - CalculateItemConfigurationCalculatedSalesPrice(CalcForecast), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
552  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice);
553  CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(SalesLine,
554  SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice,
555  SalesLineUnitPrice);
556  end;
557  else begin
558  SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice := CheckIfSalesDiscountsAreDefinedAndCalculateUnitPrice(CalcForecast);
559  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice);
560  CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(SalesLine, SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice, FixPriceAmount);
561  end;
562  end;
563  end;
564 
565  local procedure CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice: Decimal; SalesLineUnitPrice: Decimal)
566  begin
567  SalesLine."TSRD Fixed Price" := true;
568  SalesLine."Line Discount Calculation" := SalesLine."Line Discount Calculation"::Amount;
569  SalesLine.Validate("Line Discount Amount", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice - SalesLineUnitPrice);
570  Clear(SalesLine."TSRD Fixed Price");
571  end;
572 
573  local procedure CalculateItemConfigurationDirectUnitCost(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Decimal
574  var
575  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
576  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
577  begin
578  FilterCalcConfiguration(CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast);
579  CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)");
580  exit(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)"));
581  end;
582 
583  local procedure CalculateItemConfigurationCalculatedSalesPrice(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Decimal
584  var
585  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
586  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
587  begin
588  FilterCalcConfiguration(CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast);
589  CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Calculated Sales Price");
590  exit(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price"));
591  end;
592 
593  local procedure FilterCalcConfiguration(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
594  var
595  begin
596  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
597  if CheckIfItemChargeDefined(CalcConfiguration) then
598  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Type, '%1|%2', CalcConfiguration.Type::Item, CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment)
599  else
600  CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, CalcConfiguration.Type::Item);
601  end;
602 
603  local procedure CheckIfItemChargeDefined(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"): Boolean
604  var
605  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
606  begin
607  SalesReceivablesSetup.GetRecordOnce();
608  if SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Charge for Equipment" <> '' then
609  exit(true);
610  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Item Charge", '=%1', '');
611  CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment);
612  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
613  exit;
614  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Item Charge");
615  CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type);
616  exit(true);
617  end;
618 
619  local procedure CheckIfSalesDiscountsAreDefinedAndCalculateUnitPrice(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Decimal
620  var
621  SalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
622  begin
623  SalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
624  if not SalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
625  exit(CalcForecast.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() + CalcForecast."Equipment Price" + CalcForecast."Workshop Amount" + CalcForecast."Total Costs");
626  exit(CalcForecast."Sales Price");
627  end;
628 
629  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromStandardEquipment(
630  CalcForecastNo: Code[20];
631  var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
632  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
633  MainSalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
634  )
635  var
636  StandardEquipment: Record "TSRD Standard Equipment";
637  begin
638  StandardEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
639  StandardEquipment.SetRange("Print In Sales Doc.", true);
640  if StandardEquipment.IsEmpty() then
641  exit;
642  StandardEquipment.FindSet();
643  repeat
644  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
645  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
646  SalesLine.Description := StandardEquipment.Description;
647  SalesLine."TSRM Equipment Line" := true;
648  SalesLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := StandardEquipment.Code;
649  SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := MainSalesLine."Line No.";
650  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := MainSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier";
651  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := MainSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set";
652  SalesLine.Insert();
653  until StandardEquipment.Next() = 0;
654  end;
655 
656  local procedure CreateSalesLinesExtText(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var LineNo: Integer)
657  var
658  LastInsertedSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
659  TransferExtendedText: Codeunit "Transfer Extended Text";
660  begin
661  if not TransferExtendedText.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(SalesLine, false, SalesHeader) then
662  exit;
663  TransferExtendedText.InsertSalesExtTextRetLast(SalesLine, LastInsertedSalesLine);
664  LineNo := LastInsertedSalesLine."Line No.";
665  end;
666 
667  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromConfiguration(
668  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
669  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
670  SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line"
671  )
672  var
673  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
674  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
675  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
676  CreateEmptyLine: Boolean;
677  LinesSort: Enum "TSRD Configuration Sort Order";
678  OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
679  CurrentCategoryDescription: Text;
680  begin
681  LinesSort := CalcForecastMgt.GetCalcConfigSortOrderSales(CalcConfiguration);
682  CreateEmptyLine := LinesSort = "TSRD Configuration Sort Order"::"Category Description";
683  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
684  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Show In Sales Documents", true);
685  if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
686  exit;
687  SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
688  CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration.TableCaption(), true, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration);
689  if LinesSort = "TSRD Configuration Sort Order"::"Line No." then
690  CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
691  ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
692  CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
693  repeat
694  if CurrentCategoryDescription <> CalcConfiguration."Category Description" then begin
695  CurrentCategoryDescription := CalcConfiguration."Category Description";
696  CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration."Category Description", CreateEmptyLine, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration);
697  end;
698 
699  CreateConfigSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast, SalesLineOriginal, 0);
700 
701  CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcConfiguration, SalesLine);
702 
703  if CalcConfiguration."Show Comment Lines Sales Docs" then
704  CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(SalesLine);
705 
706  if CalcConfiguration."Show List Price" then begin
707  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
708  CreateConfigListPriceSalesLine(SalesLine, CalcConfiguration."List Price");
709  end;
710  until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
711  end;
712 
713  local procedure CreateConfigListPriceSalesLine(SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcConfListPrice: Decimal)
714  var
715  ListPriceLbl: Label 'List Price:';
716  begin
717  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
718  SalesLine.Description := ListPriceLbl;
719  SalesLine."Description 2" := Format(CalcConfListPrice, 0, 0);
720  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
721  SalesLine.Insert(true);
722  end;
723 
724  local procedure CreateConfigSalesLine(
725  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
726  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
727  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
728  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
729  SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
730  LineNo: Integer
731  )
732  var
733  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
734  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
735  ItemChargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Item Charge Mgt";
736  begin
737  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
738  SalesHeader.Get(SalesLine."Document Type", SalesLine."Document No.");
739  ItemChargeMgt.CheckNotAutomaticAllocation(CalcConfiguration."Item Charge");
740  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
741  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
742  if (not CalcForecast."Show List Prices" or (CalcConfiguration."List Price" = 0)) and (not CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices") then begin
743  CalcForecastMgt.GetTranslatedEquipmentDescription(CalcConfiguration, SalesHeader."Language Code");
744  InsertConfigurationAsCommentLine(SalesLine, CalcConfiguration);
745  LinkToSourceRec(
746  SalesLine,
747  SalesLineOriginal."Line No.",
748  CalcForecast."No.",
749  Database::"TSRD Calc. Configuration",
750  CalcConfiguration."Line No."
751  );
752  SalesLine.Modify();
753  exit;
754  end;
755  SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Vendor Item No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");
756 
757  if CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Item then begin
758  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
759  SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");
760  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
761  SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecast."No.");
762  end;
763 
764  if (CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment) and
765  (CalcConfiguration."Item Charge" <> '') then begin
766  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)");
767  SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcConfiguration."Item Charge");
768  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
769  SalesLine.Validate(Description, CalcConfiguration.Description);
770  SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Vendor Item No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");
771  end;
772  CalcForecastMgt.GetTranslatedEquipmentDescription(CalcConfiguration, SalesHeader."Language Code");
773  SalesLine.Description := CalcConfiguration.GetCommentLineForm();
774 
775  SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
776 
777  if SalesLine.Type <> SalesLine.Type::" " then begin
778  SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, CalcConfiguration.Quantity);
779  case
780  true of
781  CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices":
782  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price");
783  CalcForecast."Show List Prices":
784  begin
785  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcConfiguration."List Price");
786  SalesLine.Validate("Line Discount %", CalcConfiguration."Discount % (List Price)");
787  end;
788  end;
789  end;
790  LinkToSourceRec(
791  SalesLine,
792  SalesLineOriginal."Line No.",
793  CalcForecast."No.",
794  Database::"TSRD Calc. Configuration",
795  CalcConfiguration."Line No."
796  );
797  SalesLine.Insert(true);
798 
799  if (CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment) and
800  (CalcConfiguration."Item Charge" <> '') then begin
801  ItemChargeMgt.CheckAndAssignItemChargeLines(SalesLine);
802  ItemChargeMgt.AssignItemCharge(SalesLineOriginal, SalesLine);
803  end;
804  if SalesLine.Type in [SalesLine.Type::Item, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset"] then
805  SetFixPriceFields(SalesLine, CalcForecast)
806  else
807  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
808  OnBeforeExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(CalcForecast, CalcConfiguration, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
809  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
810  SalesLine.Modify(true);
811  end;
812 
813  local procedure LinkToSourceRec(
814  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
815  AttachedEquipmentToLineNo: Integer;
816  SourceRecNo: Code[20];
817  SourceTable: Integer;
818  SourceLineNo: Integer
819  )
820  begin
821  SalesLine."TSRM Attached Equ. to Line No." := AttachedEquipmentToLineNo;
822  SalesLine."TSRM Source Record No." := SourceRecNo;
823  SalesLine."TSRM Source Table" := SourceTable;
824  SalesLine."TSRM Source Line No." := SourceLineNo;
825  end;
826 
827  local procedure InsertConfigurationAsCommentLine(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
828  begin
829  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
830  SalesLine.Description := CalcConfiguration.GetCommentLineForm();
831  if CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment then
832  SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Vendor Item No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");
833  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
834  SalesLine.Insert(true);
835  end;
836 
837  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromEquipment(
838  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
839  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
840  SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line"
841  )
842  var
843  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
844  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
845  OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
846  begin
847  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
848  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
849  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", 0);
850  if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
851  exit;
852 
853  SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
854  CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment.TableCaption(), true, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment");
855  ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
856 
857  CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
858  repeat
859  CreateSalesLineFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment, SalesLineOriginal, 0);
860  CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(SalesHeader, CalcForecast."No.", CalcExternalEquipment."Line No.", SalesLine);
861  until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
862  end;
863 
864  local procedure CreateSalesLineFromEquipment(
865  var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
866  var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
867  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
868  var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
869  SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
870  LineNo: Integer
871  )
872  begin
873  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
874  SalesLine.Insert(true);
875  SalesLine.SetSkipInflationSurcharge(true);
876  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
877  SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.GetCommentLineForm();
·- if CalcExternalEquipment."Calculate Separately" then
878+ if CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" = CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::"Calc. Separatly" then
879  CreateSalesLineFromSeparateEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment);
880  LinkToSourceRec(
881  SalesLine,
882  SalesLineOriginal."Line No.",
883  CalcForecast."No.",
884  Database::"TSRD Calc. External Equipment",
885  CalcExternalEquipment."Line No."
886  );
887  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment";
888  SetFixPriceAllowed(CalcForecast, SalesLine);
889  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
890  SalesLine.Modify(true);
891  CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(
892  CalcExternalEquipment."Forecast No.",
893  CalcExternalEquipment."Line No.",
894  "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"::"External Equipment",
895  SalesLine
896  );
897  OnAfterCreateSalesLineFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment);
898  end;
899 
900  local procedure CreateSalesLineFromSeparateEquipment(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment")
901  var
902  Item: Record Item;
903  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
904  InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
905  begin
906  case CalcExternalEquipment.Type of
907  CalcExternalEquipment.Type::Item:
908  begin
909  if CalcExternalEquipment."No." = '' then
910  exit;
911  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
912  SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcExternalEquipment."No.");
913  SetServiceItemNoFromPurchLine(SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment);
914  SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
915  SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecast."No.");
916  SalesLine.Validate("Unit of Measure Code", CalcExternalEquipment."Unit of Measure");
917  SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, CalcExternalEquipment.Quantity);
918  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcExternalEquipment."Line Amount" / CalcExternalEquipment.Quantity);
919  InflationSurchargeMgt.IncludeInflationSurchargeInUnitPrice(SalesLine);
920  Item.Get(CalcExternalEquipment."No.");
921  if Item.Description <> CalcExternalEquipment.Description then
922  SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
923  end;
924  CalcExternalEquipment.Type::"Service Item":
925  begin
926  if CalcExternalEquipment."No." = '' then
927  exit;
928  SalesLine.SetSkipServiceItemDocData(true);
929  ServiceItem.Get(CalcExternalEquipment."No.");
930  case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
931  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
932  begin
933  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
934  SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", ServiceItem."No.");
935  end;
936  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
937  begin
938  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset");
939  SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", ServiceItem."No.");
940  end;
941  end;
942  SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
943  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcExternalEquipment."Line Amount");
944  if ServiceItem.Description <> CalcExternalEquipment.Description then
945  SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
946  end;
947  end;
948  end;
949 
950  local procedure SetServiceItemNoFromPurchLine(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment")
951  var
952  PurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line";
953  begin
954  if not PurchaseLine.Get(
955  CalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Document Type",
956  CalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Document No.",
957  CalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Document Line No."
958  )
959  then
960  exit;
961  if PurchaseLine.Type <> PurchaseLine.Type::Item then
962  exit;
963  if SalesLine."TSRM Service Item No." <> '' then
964  exit;
965  if SalesLine."No." <> PurchaseLine."No." then
966  exit;
967  if PurchaseLine."TSRM Service Item No." <> '' then
968  SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", PurchaseLine."TSRM Service Item No.");
969  end;
970 
971  local procedure SetFixPriceAllowed(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
972  begin
973  if SalesLine.Type in [SalesLine.Type::Item, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset"] then
974  SetFixPriceFields(SalesLine, CalcForecast)
975  else
976  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
977  end;
978 
979  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromForecastComments(
980  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
981  ForecastNo: Code[20];
982  LineNo: Integer;
983  CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type";
984  SalesLineNo: Integer
985  )
986  var
987  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
988  SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
989  begin
990  if not FilterSaleForecastComment(SaleForecastComment,
991  ForecastNo,
992  LineNo,
993  CommentType)
994  then
995  exit;
996 
997  SaleForecastComment.FindSet();
998  repeat
999  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1000  SalesLine.Description := SaleForecastComment.Comment;
1001  SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := SalesLineNo;
1002  SalesLine.Insert(true);
1003  until SaleForecastComment.Next() = 0;
1004  end;
1005 
1006  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(
1007  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1008  ForecastNo: Code[20];
1009  ExtEquipmentLineNo: Integer;
1010  var RecSalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
1011  )
1012  var
1013  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1014  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
1015  begin
1016  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", ForecastNo);
1017  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", ExtEquipmentLineNo);
1018  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
1019  if RecSalesLine.TSRMGetSkipInsertServiceItemEquipment() then
1020  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached Equipment", false);
1021  if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
1022  exit;
1023  CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
1024  repeat
1025  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1026  SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
1027  SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := RecSalesLine."Line No.";
1028  SalesLine."TSRD Service Item Data" := CalcExternalEquipment."Service Item Doc. Data Comment";
1029  SalesLine.Insert(true);
1030  until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
1031  end;
1032 
1033  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(
1034  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1035  ForecastNo: Code[20];
1036  ExtEquipmentLineNo: Integer;
1037  var RecSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1038  var LineNo: Integer;
1039  LineSpacing: Integer
1040  )
1041  var
1042  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1043  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
1044  begin
1045  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", ForecastNo);
1046  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", ExtEquipmentLineNo);
1047  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
1048  if RecSalesLine.TSRMGetSkipInsertServiceItemEquipment() then
1049  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached Equipment", false);
1050  if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
1051  exit;
1052  CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
1053  repeat
1054  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
1055  SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
1056  SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := RecSalesLine."Line No.";
1057  SalesLine."TSRD Service Item Data" := CalcExternalEquipment."Service Item Doc. Data Comment";
1058  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment";
1059  SalesLine.Insert(true);
1060  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1061  until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
1062  end;
1063 
1064  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromWorkshop(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1065  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
1066  var
1067  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
1068  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1069  CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
1070  OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
1071  begin
1072  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
1073  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
1074  if CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
1075  exit;
1076 
1077  SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
1078  CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcWorkshop.TableCaption(), true);
1079  ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
1080 
1081  CalcWorkshop.FindSet();
1082  repeat
1083  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1084  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
1085  SalesLine.Description := CalcWorkshop.Description;
·- if CalcWorkshop."Calculate Separately" and CalcWorkshop."Show in Sales Document" and (CalcWorkshop."Standard Service Code" <> '') then begin
1086+ if (CalcWorkshop."Charging Method" = CalcWorkshop."Charging Method"::"Calc. Separatly") and CalcWorkshop."Show in Sales Document" and (CalcWorkshop."Standard Service Code" <> '') then begin
1087  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1088  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::Resource;
1089  SalesLine.Validate("No.", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Resource No. Workshop");
1090  SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
·- SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcWorkshop."Total Amount");
1091+ SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcWorkshop."Sales Price");
1092  if CalcWorkshop.Description <> '' then
1093  SalesLine.Description := CalcWorkshop.Description;
1094  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
1095  end;
1096  SalesLine.Insert(true);
1097  CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcWorkshop."Forecast No.", CalcWorkshop."Line No.", "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"::Workshops, SalesLine);
1098  until CalcWorkshop.Next() = 0;
1099  end;
1100 
1101+ local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromCost(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1102+ SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1103+ MainSalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1104+ var
1105+ SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1106+ CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
1107+ CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
1108+ OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
1109+ begin
1110+ CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
1111+ CalcCost.SetRange("Charging Method", CalcCost."Charging Method"::"Calc. Separatly");
1112+ if CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
1113+ exit;
1114+
1115+ SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
1116+ CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcCost.TableCaption(), true);
1117+ ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
1118+
1119+ CalcCost.FindSet();
1120+ repeat
1121+ CalcCostType.Get(CalcCost."Cost Type");
1122+ if CalcCostType."Sales Item Charge" <> '' then begin
1123+ PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1124+ SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)";
1125+ SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcCostType."Sales Item Charge");
1126+ SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
1127+ SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcCost."Sales Price");
1128+ SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := MainSalesLine."Line No.";
1129+ if CalcCost.Description <> '' then
1130+ SalesLine.Description := CalcCost.Description;
1131+ ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
1132+ SalesLine.Insert(true);
1133+ end;
1134+ until CalcCost.Next() = 0;
1135+ end;
1136+
1137  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromTradeInPurch(CalcForecastNo: Code[20];
1138  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1139  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
1140  var
1141  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1142  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
1143  CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
1144  InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
1145  OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
1146  ConfigurationHeaderLineTxt: Label 'Return';
1147  begin
1148  CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
1149  if CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
1150  exit;
1151 
1152  SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
1153  CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, ConfigurationHeaderLineTxt, true);
1154  ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
1155 
1156  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" := true;
1157  SalesLine.Modify();
1158  CalcTradeInPurch.FindSet();
1159  repeat
1160  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1161  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" := true;
1162  case CalcTradeInPurch.Type of
1163  "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch Type"::" ":
1164  SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::" ");
1165  "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch Type"::Item:
1166  begin
1167  SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::Item);
1168  SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcTradeInPurch."No.");
1169  SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
1170  SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecastNo);
1171  SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, CalcTradeInPurch.Quantity);
1172  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", -Abs(CalcTradeInPurch."Unit Price"));
1173  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
1174  InflationSurchargeMgt.IncludeInflationSurchargeInUnitPrice(SalesLine);
1175  SalesLine.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", CalcTradeInPurch."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
1176  end;
1177  "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch Type"::"Service Item":
1178  begin
1179  ServiceItem.Get(CalcTradeInPurch."No.");
1180  case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
1181  "TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
1182  SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::"Fixed Asset");
1183  else
1184  SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::Item);
1185  end;
1186  SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", CalcTradeInPurch."No.");
1187  SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
1188  SalesLine.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", CalcTradeInPurch."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
1189  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", -Abs(CalcTradeInPurch."Unit Price"));
1190  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
1191  end;
1192  end;
1193  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" := true;
1194  SalesLine.Description := CalcTradeInPurch.Description;
1195  if not SalesLine.Insert(true) then
1196  SalesLine.Modify(true);
1197  SetCalcForecastReturnToAttachedLines(SalesLine);
1198  until CalcTradeInPurch.Next() = 0;
1199  end;
1200 
1201  local procedure SetCalcForecastReturnToAttachedLines(ReturnSalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1202  var
1203  AttachedSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1204  begin
1205  AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", ReturnSalesLine."Document Type");
1206  AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", ReturnSalesLine."Document No.");
1207  AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", ReturnSalesLine."Line No.");
1208  AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Calc. Forecast Return", false);
1209  if not AttachedSalesLine.IsEmpty() then
1210  AttachedSalesLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Calc. Forecast Return", true);
1211  end;
1212 
1213  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromSalesDiscounts(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line")
1214  var
1215  ItemCharge: Record "Item Charge";
1216  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1217  CalcDiscount: Record "TSRD Calc. Discount";
1218  CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
1219  ItemChargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Item Charge Mgt";
1220  MasterTranslMgt: Codeunit "TSR Master Transl. Mgt";
1221  OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
1222  SalesDiscountsHeaderLineTxt: Label 'Sales Discounts';
1223  begin
1224  CalcSalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
1225  if CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
1226  exit;
1227  SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
1228  CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, SalesDiscountsHeaderLineTxt, true);
1229  ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
1230  CalcSalesDiscounts.FindSet();
1231  repeat
1232  GetItemChargeFromSalesDiscountLine(ItemCharge, CalcSalesDiscounts);
1233  ItemChargeMgt.CheckNotAutomaticAllocation(ItemCharge."No.");
1234  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1235  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)");
1236  SalesLine.Validate("No.", ItemCharge."No.");
1237  SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
1238  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", -CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount Amount");
1239  ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
1240  SalesLine.Validate("Location Code", CalcForecast."Location Code");
1241  CalcDiscount.Get(CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount Type");
1242  if CalcSalesDiscounts.DescriptionText <> CalcDiscount.Description then
1243  SalesLine.Description := CalcSalesDiscounts.DescriptionText;
1244  if SalesLine.Description = CalcDiscount.Description then
1245  MasterTranslMgt.GetMasterDataTranslation(
1246  Database::"Item Charge",
1247  ItemCharge.SystemId,
1248  ItemCharge.FieldNo(Description),
1249  SalesHeader."Language Code",
1250  SalesLine.Description);
1251  SalesLine.Insert(true);
1252  if SalesLineOriginal.Type = SalesLineOriginal.Type::Item then begin
1253  ItemChargeMgt.CheckAndAssignItemChargeLines(SalesLine);
1254  ItemChargeMgt.AssignItemCharge(SalesLineOriginal, SalesLine);
1255  end;
1256  until CalcSalesDiscounts.Next() = 0;
1257  end;
1258 
1259  local procedure CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(
1260  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1261  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1262  HeaderText: Text;
1263  CreateEmptyLine: Boolean;
1264  CommentType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"
1265  )
1266  begin
1267  if not CreateEmptyLine then
1268  exit;
1269 
1270  CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1271  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := CommentType;
1272  SalesLine.Modify();
1273 
1274  CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, HeaderText, false);
1275  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := CommentType;
1276  SalesLine.Modify();
1277  end;
1278 
1279  local procedure CreateHeadLine(
1280  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1281  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1282  HeaderText: Text;
1283  CreateEmptyLine: Boolean
1284  )
1285  begin
1286  if CreateEmptyLine then
1287  CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1288 
1289  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1290  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
1291  SalesLine.Description := CopyStr(HeaderText, 1, MaxStrLen(SalesLine.Description));
1292  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
1293  SalesLine."TSR Bold" := true;
1294  SalesLine.Insert();
1295  end;
1296 
1297  local procedure CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1298  begin
1299  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
1300  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
1301  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
1302  SalesLine.Insert();
1303  end;
1304 
1305  local procedure PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1306  begin
1307  Clear(SalesLine);
1308  SalesLine.Init();
1309  SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
1310  SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
1311  SalesLine."Line No." := GetNewSalesLineNo(SalesHeader);
1312  end;
1313 
1314  local procedure PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; LineNo: Integer)
1315  begin
1316  Clear(SalesLine);
1317  SalesLine.Init();
1318  SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
1319  SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
1320  if LineNo = 0 then
1321  SalesLine."Line No." := GetNewSalesLineNo(SalesHeader)
1322  else
1323  SalesLine."Line No." := LineNo;
1324  end;
1325 
1326  local procedure GetNewSalesLineNo(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Integer
1327  var
1328  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1329  begin
1330  SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
1331  SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
1332  if SalesLine.IsEmpty() then
1333  exit(10000);
1334  SalesLine.FindLast();
1335  exit(SalesLine."Line No." + 10000);
1336  end;
1337 
1338  local procedure GetItemFromCalcForecast(var Item: Record Item; var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
1339  var
1340  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
1341  begin
1342  if CalcForecast."Service Item No." <> '' then begin
1343  ServiceItem.Get(CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
1344  if Item.Get(ServiceItem."Item No.") then
1345  exit;
1346  end;
1347  Clear(Item);
1348  Item.SetRange("Manufacturer Code", CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code");
1349  Item.SetRange("TSRM Category Code", CalcForecast."Category Code");
1350  Item.SetRange("TSRM Subcategory Code", CalcForecast."Subcategory Code");
1351  Item.SetRange("TSRM Series Code", CalcForecast."Series Code");
1352  Item.SetRange("TSRM Model Code", CalcForecast."Model Code");
1353  if Item.IsEmpty() then
1354  Item.Get(CreateNewItem(CalcForecast))
1355  else
1356  Item.FindFirst();
1357  end;
1358 
1359  local procedure GetFAFromCalcForecast(var FixedAsset: Record "Fixed Asset"; CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
1360  var
1361  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
1362  begin
1363  if CalcForecast."Service Item No." = '' then
1364  exit;
1365  ServiceItem.Get(CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
1366  if ServiceItem."TSRM Fixed Asset No." <> '' then
1367  FixedAsset.Get(ServiceItem."TSRM Fixed Asset No.");
1368  end;
1369 
1370  local procedure GetTypeFromCalcForecast(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
1371  var
1372  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
1373  begin
1374  if CalcForecast."Service Item No." = '' then begin
1375  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
1376  exit;
1377  end;
1378  ServiceItem.Get(CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
1379  case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
1380  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
1381  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset");
1382  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
1383  SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
1384  end;
1385  end;
1386 
1387  local procedure CreateNewItem(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Code[20]
1388  var
1389  Item: Record Item;
1390  ItemTemplMgt: Codeunit "Item Templ. Mgt.";
1391  begin
1392  Commit();
1393  ItemTemplMgt.InsertItemFromTemplate(Item);
1394  AddItemAttributes(Item, CalcForecast);
1395  Item.TSRMUpdateDescription();
1396  Item.Modify(true);
1397  exit(Item."No.");
1398  end;
1399 
1400  local procedure AddItemAttributes(var Item: Record Item; var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
1401  begin
1402  Item.Validate("Manufacturer Code", CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code");
1403  Item.Validate("TSRM Category Code", CalcForecast."Category Code");
1404  Item.Validate("TSRM Subcategory Code", CalcForecast."Subcategory Code");
1405  Item.Validate("TSRM Series Code", CalcForecast."Series Code");
1406  Item.Validate("TSRM Model Code", CalcForecast."Model Code");
1407  end;
1408 
1409  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(OriginalSalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1410  var
1411  SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
1412  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1413  begin
1414  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
1415  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
1416  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Line No.", OriginalSalesLine."Line No.");
1417  if SalesCommentLine.IsEmpty() then
1418  exit;
1419  SalesCommentLine.FindSet();
1420  repeat
1421  SalesLine.Init();
1422  SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
1423  SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
1424  SalesLine.Validate("Line No.", SalesLine.TSRDGetNextNo());
1425  SalesLine.Description := SalesCommentLine.Comment;
1426  SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := SalesLine."Line No.";
1427  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier";
1428  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set";
1429  SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type", OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type");
1430  SalesLine.Insert(true);
1431  until SalesCommentLine.Next() = 0;
1432  end;
1433 
1434  local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(
1435  OriginalSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1436  var LineNo: Integer;
1437  LineSpacing: Integer
1438  )
1439  var
1440  SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
1441  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1442  begin
1443  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
1444  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
1445  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Line No.", OriginalSalesLine."Line No.");
1446  if SalesCommentLine.IsEmpty() then
1447  exit;
1448  SalesCommentLine.FindSet();
1449  repeat
1450  SalesLine.Init();
1451  SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
1452  SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
1453  SalesLine.Validate("Line No.", LineNo);
1454  SalesLine.Description := SalesCommentLine.Comment;
1455  SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := SalesLine."Line No.";
1456  SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type", OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type");
1457  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier";
1458  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set";
1459  SalesLine.Insert(true);
1460  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1461  until SalesCommentLine.Next() = 0;
1462  end;
1463 
1464  local procedure CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(
1465  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1466  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
1467  )
1468  var
1469  CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type";
1470  begin
1471  if CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment then
1472  CommentType := CommentType::Equipment
1473  else
1474  CommentType := CommentType::Configuration;
1475  CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcConfiguration."Forecast No.", CalcConfiguration."Line No.", CommentType, SalesLine);
1476  end;
1477 
1478  local procedure CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(
1479  ForecastNo: Code[20];
1480  LineNo: Integer;
1481  CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type";
1482  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
1483  )
1484  var
1485  SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
1486  SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
1487  begin
1488  if not FilterSaleForecastComment(SaleForecastComment, ForecastNo, LineNo, CommentType) then
1489  exit;
1490 
1491  SaleForecastComment.FindSet();
1492  repeat
1493  Clear(SalesCommentLine);
1494  SalesCommentLine.Init();
1495  SalesCommentLine.Validate("No.", SalesLine."Document No.");
1496  SalesCommentLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesLine."Document Type");
1497  SalesCommentLine.Validate("Document Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.");
1498  SalesCommentLine.Validate("Line No.", GetNextSalesCommentLineNo(SalesLine));
1499  SalesCommentLine.Validate(Comment, SaleForecastComment.Comment);
1500  SalesCommentLine.Validate(Date, SaleForecastComment.Date);
1501  SalesCommentLine.Insert(true);
1502  until SaleForecastComment.Next() = 0;
1503  end;
1504 
1505  local procedure FilterSaleForecastComment(var SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
1506  ForecastNo: Code[20];
1507  ConfigLineNo: Integer;
1508  CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"): Boolean
1509  begin
1510  SaleForecastComment.SetRange("Comment Type", CommentType);
1511  SaleForecastComment.SetRange("No.", ForecastNo);
1512  SaleForecastComment.SetRange("Document Line No.", ConfigLineNo);
1513  exit(not SaleForecastComment.IsEmpty());
1514  end;
1515 
1516  local procedure GetNextSalesCommentLineNo(SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"): Integer
1517  var
1518  SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
1519  begin
1520  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("No.", SalesLine."Document No.");
1521  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesLine."Document Type");
1522  SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.");
1523  if SalesCommentLine.IsEmpty() then
1524  exit(10000);
1525  SalesCommentLine.FindLast();
1526  exit(SalesCommentLine."Line No." + 10000)
1527  end;
1528 
1529  local procedure CheckMandatoryFieldForWorkshops(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
1530  var
1531  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
1532  CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
1533  begin
1534  CalcForecast.FindSet();
1535  repeat
1536  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
1537  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Calculate Separately", true);
1538  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
1539  CalcWorkshop.SetFilter("Standard Service Code", '<>%1', '');
1540  if not CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then begin
1541  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1542  SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField("TSRD Resource No. Workshop");
1543  exit;
1544  end;
1545  until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
1546  end;
1547 
1548  local procedure GetItemChargeFromSalesDiscountLine(var ItemCharge: Record "Item Charge"; var CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts")
1549  var
1550  CalcDiscount: Record "TSRD Calc. Discount";
1551  begin
1552  CalcDiscount.Get(CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount Type");
1553  ItemCharge.Get(CalcDiscount."Item Charge");
1554  end;
1555 
1556  local procedure SetVATPostingGroups(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcForecastNo: Code[20])
1557  var
1558  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1559  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1560  begin
1561  CalcForecast.Get(CalcForecastNo);
1562  CalcSalesForecast.Get(CalcForecast."Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcForecast."Version No.");
1563  if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
1564  exit;
1565  SalesLine.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", CalcForecast."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
1566  end;
1567 
1568  local procedure SetCurrencyCodeFromCalcForecast(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; SalesCurr: Code[10]; SalesExchangeRate: Decimal)
1569  begin
1570  if SalesCurr = '' then
1571  exit;
1572  SalesHeader.Validate("Currency Code", SalesCurr);
1573  if SalesExchangeRate = 0 then
1574  exit;
1575  SalesHeader."Currency Factor" := 1 / SalesExchangeRate;
1576  end;
1577 
1578  local procedure ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
1579  var
1580  CalcCurrency: Record Currency;
1581  GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
1582  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1583  begin
1584  GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
1585  if (CalcForecast."Calculation Currency" = '') and (CalcForecast."Sales Currency" = '') then
1586  exit;
1587  if CalcForecast."Calculation Currency" = '' then begin
1588  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", Round(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtLCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", SalesLine."Unit Price"), GeneralLedgerSetup."Amount Rounding Precision"));
1589  exit;
1590  end;
1591  if CalcForecast."Sales Currency" = '' then begin
1592  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", Round(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoLCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", SalesLine."Unit Price"), GeneralLedgerSetup."Amount Rounding Precision"));
1593  exit;
1594  end;
1595  CalcCurrency.Get(CalcForecast."Calculation Currency");
1596  SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", Round(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", SalesLine."Unit Price"), CalcCurrency."Amount Rounding Precision"));
1597  end;
1598 
1599  local procedure SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var OriginalLanguageId: Integer)
1600  var
1601  Language: Record Language;
1602  begin
1603  if SalesHeader."Language Code" = '' then
1604  exit;
1605 
1606  OriginalLanguageId := GlobalLanguage();
1607 
1608  Language.Get(SalesHeader."Language Code");
1609  if Language."Windows Language ID" = OriginalLanguageId then
1610  exit;
1611 
1612  GlobalLanguage(Language."Windows Language ID");
1613  end;
1614 
1615  local procedure ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId: Integer)
1616  begin
1617  if OriginalLanguageId = 0 then
1618  exit;
1619  GlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
1620  end;
1621 
1622  local procedure SetFixPriceFields(
1623  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1624  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
1625  ): Boolean
1626  begin
1627  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := CalcForecast."Fix Price allowed";
1628  if not SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" then
1629  exit(false);
1630 
1631  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := SalesLine."Document No.";
1632  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := true;
1633  exit(true);
1634  end;
1635 
1636  #endregion Local Procedures
1637 
1638  #region Update Sales Lines Equipment
1639 
1640  internal procedure InsertPrintConfigurationLines(
1641  SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
1642  var TempConfiguration: Record "TSRD Configuration Selection" temporary
1643  )
1644  var
1645  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1646  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1647  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1648  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1649  LineNo: Integer;
1650  LineSpacing: Integer;
1651  StartLineNo: Integer;
1652  begin
1653  StartLineNo := ClearEquipmentLines(SalesLineOriginal, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration);
1654  if TempConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1655  exit;
1656  SalesHeader.Get(SalesLineOriginal."Document Type", SalesLineOriginal."Document No.");
1657  CalcForecast.Get(TempConfiguration."Forecast No.");
1658  CreateCommentLines(
1659  SalesLineOriginal,
1660  "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration,
1661  CalcConfiguration.TableCaption(),
1662  GetTotalLines(TempConfiguration, CalcForecast),
1663  StartLineNo,
1664  LineSpacing,
1665  LineNo
1666  );
1667 
1668  TempConfiguration.FindSet();
1669  repeat
1670  CalcConfiguration.Get(TempConfiguration."Forecast No.", TempConfiguration."Line No.");
1671  CreateConfigSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast, SalesLineOriginal, LineNo);
1672 
1673  CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcConfiguration, SalesLine);
1674  if CalcConfiguration."Show Comment Lines Sales Docs" then begin
1675  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1676  CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(SalesLine, LineNo, LineSpacing);
1677  end;
1678 
1679  if CalcConfiguration."Show List Price" then begin
1680  PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
1681  CreateConfigListPriceSalesLine(SalesLine, CalcConfiguration."List Price");
1682  end;
1683 
1684  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1685  until TempConfiguration.Next() = 0;
1686  end;
1687 
1688  internal procedure InsertPrintExternalEquipmentLines(
1689  SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
1690  var TempExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Ext Equipment Selection" temporary
1691  )
1692  var
1693  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1694  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1695  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
1696  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1697  LineNo: Integer;
1698  LineSpacing: Integer;
1699  StartLineNo: Integer;
1700  begin
1701  StartLineNo := ClearEquipmentLines(SalesLineOriginal, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment");
1702  if TempExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
1703  exit;
1704  SalesHeader.Get(SalesLineOriginal."Document Type", SalesLineOriginal."Document No.");
1705  CalcForecast.Get(TempExternalEquipment."Forecast No.");
1706  CreateCommentLines(
1707  SalesLineOriginal,
1708  "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment",
1709  CalcExternalEquipment.TableCaption(),
1710  GetTotalLines(TempExternalEquipment, CalcForecast),
1711  StartLineNo,
1712  LineSpacing,
1713  LineNo
1714  );
1715 
1716  TempExternalEquipment.FindSet();
1717  repeat
1718  CalcExternalEquipment.Get(TempExternalEquipment."Forecast No.", TempExternalEquipment."Line No.");
1719  CreateSalesLineFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment, SalesLineOriginal, LineNo);
1720  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1721  CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(
1722  SalesHeader,
1723  CalcForecast."No.",
1724  CalcExternalEquipment."Line No.",
1725  SalesLine,
1726  LineNo,
1727  LineSpacing
1728  );
1729  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1730  until TempExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
1731  end;
1732 
1733  local procedure GetTotalLines(
1734  TempConfiguration: Record "TSRD Configuration Selection" temporary;
