1735  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
1736  ) TotalLines: Integer
1737  var
1738  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1739  SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
1740  begin
1741  TotalLines := TempConfiguration.Count();
1742  SaleForecastComment.SetRange("Comment Type", "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"::Configuration);
1743  SaleForecastComment.SetRange("No.", CalcForecast."No.");
1744  TotalLines += SaleForecastComment.Count();
1745  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
1746  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Show List Price", true);
1747  TotalLines += CalcConfiguration.Count();
1748  end;
1749 
1750  local procedure GetTotalLines(
1751  TempExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Ext Equipment Selection" temporary;
1752  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
1753  ) TotalLines: Integer
1754  var
1755  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
1756  begin
1757  TotalLines := TempExternalEquipment.Count();
1758  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
1759  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type"::Comment);
1760  TotalLines += CalcExternalEquipment.Count();
1761  end;
1762 
1763  local procedure ClearEquipmentLines(
1764  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1765  LineType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"
1766  ) StartLineNo: Integer
1767  var
1768  FilteredSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1769  begin
1770  FilteredSalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesLine."Document Type");
1771  FilteredSalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesLine."Document No.");
1772  FilteredSalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type", LineType);
1773  if FilteredSalesLine.IsEmpty() then begin
1774  StartLineNo := SalesLine.TSRDGetNextNo();
1775  exit;
1776  end;
1777  FilteredSalesLine.FindSet();
1778  StartLineNo := FilteredSalesLine."Line No.";
1779  repeat
1780  DeleteSalesLineTracking(FilteredSalesLine);
1781  FilteredSalesLine.Delete(true);
1782  until FilteredSalesLine.Next() = 0;
1783  end;
1784 
1785  local procedure CreateCommentLines(
1786  var SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
1787  LineType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type";
1788  HeaderLineTxt: Text;
1789  NoOfLines: Integer;
1790  StartLineNo: Integer;
1791  var LineSpacing: Integer;
1792  var LineNo: Integer
1793  )
1794  var
1795  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1796  SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1797  HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
1798  RecRef: RecordRef;
1799  begin
1800  SalesHeader.Get(SalesLineOriginal."Document Type", SalesLineOriginal."Document No.");
1801  CreateEmptyCommentLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, StartLineNo, LineType);
1802  RecRef.GetTable(SalesLine);
1803  LineNo := SalesLine."Line No.";
1804  LineSpacing := HelperTools.AutoSplitLineNo_After(RecRef, SalesLine.FieldNo("Line No."), 2 + NoOfLines);
1805  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1806  CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, HeaderLineTxt, LineType, LineNo);
1807  LineNo += LineSpacing;
1808  end;
1809 
1810  local procedure DeleteSalesLineTracking(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1811  var
1812  ReservationManagement: Codeunit "Reservation Management";
1813  begin
1814  ReservationManagement.SetReservSource(SalesLine);
1815  ReservationManagement.SetItemTrackingHandling(1);
1816  ReservationManagement.DeleteReservEntries(true, 0);
1817  end;
1818 
1819  local procedure CreateEmptyCommentLine(
1820  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1821  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1822  LineNo: Integer;
1823  CalcWorksheetLineType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"
1824  )
1825  begin
1826  SalesLine.Init();
1827  SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
1828  SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
1829  SalesLine."Line No." := LineNo;
1830  SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
1831  SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
1832  SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := CalcWorksheetLineType;
1833  SalesLine.Insert();
1834  end;
1835 
1836  local procedure CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(
1837  SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
1838  var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
1839  HeaderText: Text;
1840  CommentType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type";
1841  LineNo: Integer
1842  )
1843  begin
1844  CreateEmptyCommentLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo, CommentType);
1845  SalesLine.Description := CopyStr(HeaderText, 1, MaxStrLen(SalesLine.Description));
1846  SalesLine."TSR Bold" := true;
1847  SalesLine.Modify();
1848  end;
1849 
1850  #endregion Update Sales Lines Equipment
1851 
1852  #region Events
1853 
1854  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
1855  local procedure OnBeforeCheckForOrderType(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
1856  begin
1857  end;

1860  local procedure OnAfterCreateSalesDoc(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
1861  begin
1862  end;
1863 
1864  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
1865  local procedure OnBeforeModifySalesLine(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1866  begin
1867  end;
1868 
1869  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
1870  local procedure OnBeforeExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
1871  begin
1872  end;
1873 
1874  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
1875  local procedure OnAfterCreateSalesLineFromEquipment(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment")
1876  begin
1877  end;
1878 
1879  #endregion Events
1880 }
+55 −11
1 table 5446009 "TSRD Calc. Workshop"
2 {
3  Caption = 'Services';
4  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
5  DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Workshop Lookup";
6  LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Workshop Lookup";
7 
8  //Always update archive table as well!
9 
10  fields
11  {
12  field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
13  {
14  Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
15  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
16  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
17  TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast"."No.";
18  }
19  field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
20  {
21  Caption = 'Line No.';
22  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
23  }
24  field(5; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
25  {
26  Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
27  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
28+ ObsoleteState = Pending;
29+ ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by Charging Method.';
30+ ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
31 
32  trigger OnValidate()
33  begin
34  if "Calculate Separately" then begin
35  "Show in Sales Document" := true;
36  CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
37  CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
38  end;
39  end;
40  }
41  field(6; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
42  {
43  Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
44  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
45  }
46  field(7; "Standard Service Code"; Code[20])
47  {
48  Caption = 'Standard Service Code';
49  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
50  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
51  TableRelation = "Standard Service Code".Code;
52 
53  trigger OnLookup()
54  var
55  StandardServiceCode: Record "Standard Service Code";
56  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
57  begin
58  CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
59  CalcForecast.TestField("Manufacturer Code");
60  StandardServiceCode.FilterGroup(2);
61  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Manufacturer Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code", '');
62  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Category Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Category Code", '');
63  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Subcategory Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Subcategory Code", '');
64  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Series Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Series Code", '');
65  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Model Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Model Code", '');
66  StandardServiceCode.FilterGroup(0);
67  if Page.RunModal(Page::"Standard Service Codes", StandardServiceCode) = Action::LookupOK then
68  Validate("Standard Service Code", StandardServiceCode.Code);
69  end;
70 
71  trigger OnValidate()
72  var
73  StandardServiceCode: Record "Standard Service Code";
74  TempCalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop" temporary;
75  begin
76  TempCalcWorkshop := Rec;
77  Init();
78  "Forecast No." := TempCalcWorkshop."Forecast No.";
79  "Line No." := TempCalcWorkshop."Line No.";
80  "Standard Service Code" := TempCalcWorkshop."Standard Service Code";
81  "Service Order Type" := TempCalcWorkshop."Service Order Type";
82  "Responsibility Center" := TempCalcWorkshop."Responsibility Center";
83  "Location Code" := TempCalcWorkshop."Location Code";
84  if not StandardServiceCode.Get("Standard Service Code") then
85  exit;
86  StandardServiceCode.CalcFields("TSRD Default Worktime Amount");
87  "Default Worktime Amount" := StandardServiceCode."TSRD Default Worktime Amount";
88  Description := StandardServiceCode.Description;
89  if not StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Active" then
90  exit;
91  Validate("Amount (Labor)", StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Labor");
92  Validate("Amount (Parts)", StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Parts");
93  end;
94  }
95  field(10; Description; Text[100])
96  {
97  Caption = 'Description';
98  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
99  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
100  }
101  field(11; "Default Worktime Amount"; Decimal)
102  {
103  BlankZero = true;
104  Caption = 'Default Worktime Amount';
105  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
106  }
107  field(13; "Amount (Labor)"; Decimal)
108  {
109  BlankZero = true;
110  Caption = 'Amount (Labor)';
111  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
112  trigger OnValidate()
113  begin
114  UpdateTotalAmount();
115  end;
116  }
117  field(14; "Amount (Parts)"; Decimal)
118  {
119  BlankZero = true;
120  Caption = 'Amount (Parts)';
121  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
122  trigger OnValidate()
123  begin
124  UpdateTotalAmount();
125  end;
126  }
127  field(15; "Total Amount"; Decimal)
128  {
129  BlankZero = true;
130  Caption = 'Total Amount';
131  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
132  trigger OnValidate()
133  begin
134  if "Total Amount" <> xRec."Total Amount" then begin
135  "Amount (Labor)" := 0;
136  "Amount (Parts)" := 0;
137  exit;
138  end;
139  UpdateTotalAmount();
140  end;
141  }
142  field(20; "Service Document Type"; Option)
143  {
144  Caption = 'Service Document Type';
145  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
146  Editable = false;
147  OptionCaption = ' ,Order,Quote,Invoice';
148  OptionMembers = " ","Order",Quote,Invoice;
149  }
150  field(21; "Service Document No."; Code[20])
151  {
152  Caption = 'Service Document';
153  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
154  Editable = false;
155  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
156  }
157  field(22; "External Equipment Line No."; Integer)
158  {
159  BlankZero = true;
160  Caption = 'External Equipment Line No.';
161  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
162  Editable = false;
163  ObsoleteReason = '#22688 field not needed, 1 worshop line can be linked to multiple Calc Ext Equipment lines';
164  ObsoleteState = Pending;
165  ObsoleteTag = '2402';
166  }
167  field(24; "Linked to External Equipment"; Boolean)
168  {
169  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. External Equipment" where("Workshop Line No." = field("Line No."),
170  "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No.")));
171  Caption = 'Linked to Additional Configuration';
172  Editable = false;
173  FieldClass = FlowField;
174  }
175  field(25; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
176  {
177  BlankZero = true;
178  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Sale Forecast Comment" where("Comment Type" = const(Workshops), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
179  "Document Line No." = field("Line No.")));
180  Caption = 'Comments exist';
181  Editable = false;
182  FieldClass = FlowField;
183  }
184  field(30; "Service Order Type"; Code[10])
185  {
186  Caption = 'Service Order Type';
187  TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Service" = const(true));
188  }
189  field(31; "Capitalized Service"; Boolean)
190  {
191  CalcFormula = lookup("Service Order Type"."TSRD Capitalized Service" where("Code" = field("Service Order Type")));
192  Caption = 'Capitalized Service';
193  Editable = false;
194  FieldClass = FlowField;
195  }
196  field(35; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
197  {
198  Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
199  TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
200 
201  trigger OnLookup()
202  var
203  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
204  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
205  begin
206  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service);
207  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
208  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
209  end;
210 
211  trigger OnValidate()
212  var
213  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
214  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
215  begin
216  RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service);
217  CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
218  end;
219  }
220  field(40; "Location Code"; Code[10])
221  {
222  Caption = 'Location Code';
223  TableRelation = Location;
224  }
225  field(50; "Service Order Status"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Workshop Status")
226  {
227  Caption = 'Service Order Status';
228  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
229  Editable = false;
230  }
231+ field(51; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Charging Method")
232+ {
233+ Caption = 'Charging Method';
234+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
235+
236+ trigger OnValidate()
237+ begin
238+ if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separatly" then begin
239+ Validate("Show in Sales Document", true);
240+ CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
241+ CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
242+ end else begin
243+ Validate("Margin %", 0);
244+ end;
245+ end;
246+ }
247+ field(52; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
248+ {
249+ Caption = 'Sales Price';
250+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
251+ Editable = false;
252+ }
253+ field(53; "Margin %"; Decimal)
254+ {
255+ Caption = 'Margin %';
256+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
257+ Editable = false;
258+ }
259+ field(54; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
260+ {
261+ Caption = 'Margin Amount';
262+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
263+ Editable = false;
264+ }
265  }
266 
267  keys
268  {
269  key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
270  {
271  Clustered = true;
272  }
273  key(TSRDShowInSales; "Forecast No.", "Show in Sales Document") { }
274  }
275 
276  var
277  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
278  HasCalcForecast: Boolean;
279  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
280 
281 
282 
283  trigger OnInsert()
284  var
285  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
286  begin
287  CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
288  TestForecastStatusOpen();
289  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
290  end;
291 
292  trigger OnModify()
293  var
294  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
295  begin
296  CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
297  TestForecastStatusOpen();
298  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
299  end;
300 
301  trigger OnDelete()
302  var
303  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
304  begin
305  UnlinkExternalEquipmentAfterDelete();
306  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
307  end;
308 
309  internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
310  begin
311  GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
312  CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
313  end;
314 
315  local procedure UnlinkExternalEquipmentAfterDelete()
316  var
317  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
318  begin
319  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
320  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Workshop Line No.", "Line No.");
321  if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
322  exit;
323  CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", 0);
324  end;
325 
326  local procedure UpdateTotalAmount()
327  begin
328  "Total Amount" := "Amount (Labor)" + "Amount (Parts)";
329  end;
330 
331  internal procedure OpenLinkedServiceDocument()
332  var
333  ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
334  ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
335  begin
336  case "Service Document Type" of
337  "Service Document Type"::Order:
338  if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Order, "Service Document No.") then
339  Page.Run(Page::"Service Order", ServiceHeader);
340  "Service Document Type"::Quote:
341  if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Quote, "Service Document No.") then
342  Page.Run(Page::"Service Quote", ServiceHeader);
343  "Service Document Type"::Invoice:
344  if ServiceInvoiceHeader.Get("Service Document No.") then
345  Page.Run(Page::"Posted Service Invoice", ServiceInvoiceHeader);
346  end
347  end;
348 
349  local procedure GetCalcForecast(ForecastNo: Code[20])
350  begin
351  if not HasCalcForecast then
352  HasCalcForecast := CalcForecast.Get(ForecastNo);
353  end;
354 
355  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
356  var
357  CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
358  begin
359  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
360  if CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
361  exit(10000);
362  CalcWorkshop.FindLast();
363  exit(CalcWorkshop."Line No." + 10000);
364  end;
365 
366  internal procedure InitOrderType()
367  var
368  ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
369  UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
370  begin
371  UserSetup.Get(UserId());
372  if UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type" = '' then
373  exit;
374  if not ServiceOrderType.Get(UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type") then
375  exit;
376  if not ServiceOrderType."TSR Internal Invoicing" then
377  exit;
378  Rec.Validate("Service Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type");
379  end;
380 
381  internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
382  var
383  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
384  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
385  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
386  begin
387  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
388  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Internal Customer");
389  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
390  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
391  end;
392 }

2 {
3  Access = Internal;
4  SingleInstance = true;
5

14  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnAfterDeleteEvent', '', false, false)]

16  var
17  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
18  MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
19  begin

21  exit;
22  MachineCommunityMgt.DeleteSharedDocuments(Rec);
23  if not RunTrigger then
24  exit;

26  end;

58  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnAfterDeleteEvent', '', true, true)]
59  local procedure "Service Item Line_OnAfterDeleteEvent"(var Rec: Record "Service Item Line"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
60  var
61  WorkshopBinMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Workshop Bin Mgt.";
62  MediaMgt: Codeunit "TSR Media Mgt.";
63  begin
64  if not Rec.IsTemporary() then begin
65  MediaMgt.DeleteMedia(Rec.SystemId, "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line");
66  WorkshopBinMgt.DeleteWorkshopBin(Rec);
67  end;
68  end;

70  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'Service Item No.', true, true)]
71  local procedure ServiceItemLine_OnAfterValidateEvent_ServiceItemNo(var Rec: Record "Service Item Line"; var xRec: Record "Service Item Line"; CurrFieldNo: Integer)
72  var
73  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
74  begin
75  if Rec.IsTemporary() then
76  exit;
77 
78  ServiceMgt.InsertServiceHeaderFromServiceItemDescription(Rec, xRec, CurrFieldNo);
79  ServiceMgt.CopyLicensePlateNoToServiceItemLine(Rec);
80  ServiceMgt.CopyWarrantyInfoToServiceItemLine(Rec);
81  ServiceMgt.UpdateServiceHeaderDescriptionOnServiceItemChange(Rec);
82  ServiceMgt.UpdateBillToCustomerNoOnServiceHeader(Rec);
83  ServiceMgt.FillManufacturer(Rec);
84  end;
85 
86  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnBeforeValidateEvent', 'Service Item No.', true, true)]
87  local procedure ServiceItemLine_OnBeforeValidateEvent_ServiceItemNo(var Rec: Record "Service Item Line"; var xRec: Record "Service Item Line"; CurrFieldNo: Integer)

93  ServiceMgt.ExtendedWarrantyHandlingInServiceItemLine(Rec, CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Service Item No."));
94  end;

142  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post", 'OnBeforePostWithLines', '', false, false)]
143  local procedure "Service-Post_OnBeforePostWithLines"(var PassedServHeader: Record "Service Header"; var PassedServLine: Record "Service Line";
144  var PassedShip: Boolean; var PassedConsume: Boolean; var PassedInvoice: Boolean;
145  var IsHandled: Boolean)
146  var
147  CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
148  DebitedCostCenterMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Debited Cost Center Mgt";
149  FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
150  MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
151  ServiceDropShipBuffer: Codeunit "TSRD Service Drop Ship Buffer";
152  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
153  WorkshopBinMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Workshop Bin Mgt.";
154  begin
155  MachineCommunityMgt.CheckIfAllowedToExecuteAction(PassedServHeader);
156  FixPriceMgt.IsFixedPriceCalculated(PassedServHeader, PassedInvoice, PassedShip, false, false, true);
157  ServiceMgt.InsertLastServiceLocationFromServicePost(PassedServHeader);
158  ServiceDropShipBuffer.ClearBuffer(); // Clear global singleinstance before posting
159  WorkshopBinMgt.CheckQtyOfWorkshopBin(PassedServHeader);
160  DebitedCostCenterMgt.CheckDebitCostCenterFilledForServiceOrderType(PassedServHeader);
161  CapitalizedServiceMgt.CheckEmptyDetachLines(PassedServHeader);
162  end;
163

165  local procedure OnBeforeCheckServItemCustomer(ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; ServiceItem: Record "Service Item"; var IsHandled: Boolean);

170  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeServLineDeleteAll', '', false, false)]
171  local procedure OnBeforeServLineDeleteAll(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var NewServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var SkipDelete: Boolean);
172  var
173  MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
174  ServiceArchiveMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Archive Mgt.";
175  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
176  begin
177  if ServiceHeader.IsTemporary() then
178  exit;
179  ServiceMgt.DeleteLaborResources(NewServiceHeader);
180  MachineCommunityMgt.DeleteSharedQuotesOnAfterMakingOrder(ServiceHeader);
181  MachineCommunityMgt.InsertMachineCommElement(NewServiceHeader);
182  ServiceArchiveMgt.AutoArchiveServiceDocument(ServiceHeader);
183  end;

465  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post", 'OnAfterPostServiceDoc', '', false, false)]
466  local procedure ServicePost_OnAfterPostServiceDoc(
467  var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
468  ServInvoiceNo: Code[20];
469  ServCrMemoNo: Code[20];
470  PassedInvoice: Boolean;
471  PassedShip: Boolean
472  )
473  var
474  AgencyBusinessMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Agency Business Mgt.";
475  FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
476  FulfillmentStatusMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fulfillment Status Mgt";
477  MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
478  ServiceCorrectionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Correction Mgt.";
479  WarrantyMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Mgt.";
480  WorkshopBinMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Workshop Bin Mgt.";
481  begin
482  WarrantyMgt.UpdateWarrantyClaims(ServiceHeader, ServInvoiceNo);
483  MachineCommunityMgt.ProcessMachineCommunityElements(ServiceHeader);
484  AgencyBusinessMgt.UpdateAgencyCommissionValue(ServInvoiceNo);
485  WorkshopBinMgt.DeleteEmptyWorkshopBins(ServiceHeader, PassedInvoice);
486  FulfillmentStatusMgt.SetFulfillmentStatusAfterPost(ServiceHeader, PassedShip);
487  FixPriceMgt.CopyDocFixPriceToPostFixPrice(ServiceHeader, ServInvoiceNo, ServCrMemoNo);
488  ServiceCorrectionMgt.SetTrackInfoForCancellation(ServiceHeader, ServCrMemoNo);
489  ServiceCorrectionMgt.UpdateServiceHeader(ServiceHeader, ServInvoiceNo, ServCrMemoNo);
490  end;
491 
492  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnAfterPostDocumentLines', '', false, false)]
493  local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnAfterPostDocumentLines(
494  var ServHeader: Record "Service Header";
495  var ServInvHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
496  var ServInvLine: Record "Service Invoice Line"
497  );
498  var
499  CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
500  ServiceRequisitionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Requisition Mgt.";
501  begin
502  CapitalizedServiceMgt.PostCapitalizedService(ServHeader, ServInvLine, ServInvHeader."No." <> '');
503  CapitalizedServiceMgt.AttachServiceLineToEquipment(ServHeader, ServInvHeader, ServInvLine);
504  CapitalizedServiceMgt.DetachServiceLineToEquipment(ServHeader, ServInvHeader, ServInvLine);
505  ServiceRequisitionMgt.PostDropOrderShipment(ServHeader);
506  end;
507

538  "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line");
539  ServiceHistoryMgt.UpdateCheckListLinkAfterPosting(ServiceItemLine.RecordId, ServiceInvoiceItemLine.RecordId);
540  end;

553  end;

706  local procedure ItemJnlLine_OnAfterCopyItemJnlLineFromServLine(var ItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
707  begin
708  ItemJournalLine."Drop Shipment" := ServiceLine."TSRD Drop Shipment";
709  ItemJournalLine."TSRD Price Factor" := ServiceLine."TSRD Price Factor";
710  end;
711 
712  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnBeforeInsertServLineOnServLineRecreation', '', false, false)]
713  local procedure ServiceHeader_OnBeforeInsertServLineOnServLineRecreation(var TempServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
714  var
715  FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
716  MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
717  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
718  WarrantyDocsMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Docs Mgt";
719  begin
720  FixPriceMgt.CopyServiceLineFields(TempServiceLine, ServiceLine);
721  ServiceLine.TSRFillFieldsOnServLineRecreation(TempServiceLine);
722  WarrantyDocsMgt.UpdateFieldsOnNewServiceLines(TempServiceLine, ServiceLine);
723  MachineCommunityMgt.CopyFieldsOnRecreate(ServiceLine, TempServiceLine);
724  ServiceMgt.FillServiceItemSalesFields(TempServiceLine, ServiceLine);
725  ServiceMgt.SetWorkTypeOnRecreateServiceLines(ServiceLine, TempServiceLine);
726  end;
727 
728  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnBeforeUpdateUnitPriceByField, '', false, false)]

734  end;

736  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnBeforeRecreateServLines', '', false, false)]
737  local procedure ServiceHeader_OnBeforeRecreateServLines(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; xServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; ChangedFieldName: Text[100]; var IsHandled: Boolean);

740  begin

742  ServiceMgt.CheckIfSkipRecreateLines(ChangedFieldName, IsHandled);
743  end;

745  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnAfterServInvLineInsert', '', false, false)]
746  local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnAfterServInvLineInsert(ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var ServiceInvoiceLine: Record "Service Invoice Line")
747  var
748  FillRatesMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fill Rates Entries Mgt.";
749  MaintenanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Maintenance Mgt";
750  begin
751  MaintenanceMgt.CopyServicePostingInfo(ServiceLine, ServiceInvoiceLine);
752  if ServiceLine."Qty. to Invoice" <> 0 then
753  FillRatesMgt.SetPostedStatus(
754  ServiceLine."Document No.",
755  ServiceLine."Line No.",
756  ServiceLine."Service Item No.",
757  ServiceLine."Service Item Line No.",
758  true
759  );
760  end;
761

794  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post (Yes/No)", 'OnBeforeConfirmServPost', '', false, false)]
795  local procedure ServicePostYesNo_OnBeforeConfirmServPost(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var Ship: Boolean; var Consume: Boolean;
796  var Invoice: Boolean; var IsHandled: Boolean; PreviewMode: Boolean);
797  var
798  FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
799  begin
800  if not (Ship or Consume or Invoice) and IsHandled then
801  exit;
802  FixPriceMgt.CheckShouldPostWithoutPriceCalculation(ServiceHeader, Invoice, IsHandled, PreviewMode);
803  end;

835  [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterAssignItemValues', '', false, false)]
836  local procedure OnAfterAssignItemValues(
837  var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
838  Item: Record Item;
839  xServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
840  CallingFieldNo: Integer;
841  ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"
842  );
843  var
844  CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
845  InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
846  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";

851  end;
